LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_21.english: I will move forward as you said, brother.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_22.english: Lord Tenebris, the cleanup of the Soul Junk corpses from the last raid is almost finished.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_22.korean: 테네브리스 님.&n지난번 습격했던 소울정크의 시체 정리가 거의 끝났습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_23.english: Du hast hart gearbeitet. Jetzt kannst du endlich durchatmen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_23.korean: 고생 많으셨습니다.&n이제야 한숨 돌릴 수 있겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_24.english: It is a great relief that there was no major damage.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_25.english: To think there was only one victim despite so many Soul Junk swarming in… it is a miracle. It is all thanks to Lady Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_25.korean: 그렇게 많은 소울정크가 몰려왔는데 희생자가 단 한 명뿐이라니… 기적입니다.&n모두 테네브리스 님 덕분입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_27.english: Oh, I'm sorry. Regardless, someone lost their life... I was too thoughtless.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_27.korean: 앗, 죄송합니다.&n뭐가 됐든 목숨을 잃은 사람이 있는데… 제가 너무 경솔했군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_28.english: No, it is true that it is fortunate the damage was limited to this extent.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_28.korean: 아닙니다.&n이 정도 피해로 그친 게 다행이라는 건 사실이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_3.english: More importantly, Brother. How is the black tea today?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_3.korean: 그보다, 오라버니. 오늘 홍차 맛은 어떠신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_36.english: So you came back carried on my shoulder again. And you're covered in wounds all over your body, just like last time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_36.korean: 또 그렇게 어깨에 메여 돌아오셨군요.&n온몸에 상처투성이인 것도 지난번이랑 똑같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_38.english: Die Wunde wird schnell heilen, genau wie beim letzten Mal.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_39.english: … Anyway, it is a relief to see that the two of you seem to be getting closer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_39.korean: …아무튼, 두 분이 점점 가까워지는 것 같아 다행입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_4.english: Today… I didn’t have a maid make it; I brewed it myself… I hope it suits your taste.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_4.korean: 오늘은… 메이드가 아니라, 제가 직접 우려봤는데… 입에 맞으셨으면 좋겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_41.english: Da ich schweige, kannst du reden, wie du willst.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_42.english: I don't remember becoming friends with you.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_42.korean: 저는 당신과 친구가 된 기억은 없답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_43.english: Aber es ist doch in Ordnung, sie Lily zu nennen, oder?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_44.english: Wenn du mich bei meinem Namen nennst, sind wir Freunde.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_45.english: That is something you decided on your own…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_47.english: Seriously… do you… have no awareness that you are being a nuisance?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_47.korean: 정말이지… 당신이란 사람은…&n민폐라는 자각이 없는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_51.english: Excuse me, Mr. Eternity... are you alright?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_52.english: Thank you for your concern. But I'm fine.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_53.english: The fact that I couldn't protect it even though it was right in front of me... is my fault.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_53.korean: 눈앞에 있었음에도 지켜내지 못한 건... 제 불찰이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_54.english: I see... I hope you don't worry too much about it. I am sorry that I can only say this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_54.korean: 그렇군요… 너무 마음을 쓰지 않으셨으면 합니다.&n이런 말씀밖에 드릴 수 없어 죄송하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_55.english: Das ist mir egal, also lass mich jetzt bitte los! Wie lange willst du mich noch festhalten?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_55.korean: 그런 건 아무래도 좋으니까 이제 그만 내려주시죠!&n언제까지 저를 들고 계실 생각이신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_57.english: Haa... Well then, since I’ve finished the task I was asked to do, I’ll be going now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_57.korean: 하아… 그럼 부탁받은 일도 끝냈으니 저는 이만 가보겠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_59.english: Es scheint, als ob er mir jetzt wirklich gut folgt.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_59.korean: 이젠 정말 잘 따르게 된 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_60.english: … By the way, aren't you concerned about Eternity?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_61.english: Which part are you talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_62.english: Aren't the two of you very close? But Ms. Lily…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_62.korean: 두 분은 매우 친한 사이가 아닌가요?&n그런데 릴리 씨가…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_63.english: This is pretty normal for you, Master.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_69.english: Bist du sicher, dass es in Ordnung ist, schon so herumzuwandern?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_7.english: Ahaha... all the practice paid off!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_71.english: Considering you were once inside a Soul Junk... you look more intact than I expected.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_71.korean: 한 번 소울정크의 뱃속에 들어갔던 것치고는… 생각보다 멀쩡해 보이네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_72.english: Well, fine. I came today for a separate matter.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_72.korean: 뭐, 좋아요.&n오늘은 따로 용건이 있어서 왔답니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_73.english: I happened to get my hands on some good black tea.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_74.english: How about having some tea with me right now?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_74.korean: 어떠세요, 지금 저와 함께 티타임을 가져보시는 건?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_77.english: … Is that so? It would have been nice if there had been some snacks to go with the black tea. That's a shame.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_77.korean: …그런가요.&n홍차와 곁들일 다과라도 있었으면 좋았을 텐데, 아쉽군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_8.english: Could you ride with me often in the future?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_80.english: Really, you have no consideration for others.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_80.korean: 정말이지, 당신은 배려라는 게 없으신 분이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_81.english: Would you mind thinking a little before you speak?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_81.korean: 조금은 말하기 전에 생각이라는 걸 해보시는 게 어떠실지요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_82.english: My older brother always spoke to me so kindly... but you are so clumsy... Still, strangely enough, I don't dislike that clumsiness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_82.korean: 오라버니는 언제나 다정하게 말을 건네셨는데… 당신은 참 서툴군요…&n…그래도 그 서투름이 이상하게 싫지만은 않네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_83.english: It's okay, because I already know that you are that kind of person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_83.korean: 괜찮아요, 당신이 그런 사람이라는 건 이미 잘 알고 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_84.english: To answer your question… not now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_85.english: I'm telling you in advance so you don't misunderstand, it's not thanks to you, nor thanks to Miss Eternity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_85.korean: 오해하실까 봐 미리 말씀드리지만, 당신 덕분도, 이터니티 양 덕분도 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_86.english: It is simply… that old memories I had forgotten came to mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_86.korean: 그저… 잊고 있던 옛 기억이 떠올라서일 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_87.english: I mean a memory from a very long time ago.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_9.english: Ja! Sag mir einfach jederzeit Bescheid. Dir zuliebe… jederzeit!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_9.korean: 네! 언제든지 말씀만 해주세요.&n오라버니를 위해서라면… 언제든지요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_90.english: In that case… may I ask you one favor, for the first and last time?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_90.korean: 그렇다면… 처음이자 마지막으로 부탁 하나 해도 될까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_91.english: Just this once… would you call me 'Lil'?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_93.english: Put more emotion into it! Try again like a nobleman—kind, affectionate, and overflowing with dignity and elegance!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_93.korean: 좀 더 감정을 담아서!&n상냥하고 다정하고, 기품과 우아함이 넘치는 귀족처럼 다시 해보세요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_94.english: So… like a gentle, affectionate, and nobleman overflowing with dignity and elegance… with emotion…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_94.korean: - 그러니까… 상냥하고 다정하고 기품과 우아함이 넘치는 귀족처럼… 감정을 담아서…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_97.english: - … That laughter might be just a very small change.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_97.korean: - …그 웃음은 아주 작은 변화일 뿐인지도 모른다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_98.english: However, if that laughter continues, this girl will surely be able to move forward more brightly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5ED_98.korean: - 하지만 그 웃음이 이어진다면, 이 소녀는 분명 더 밝게 나아갈 수 있을 것이다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_10.english: I've only talked about heavy topics.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_101.english: At that moment, a huge shadow was seen approaching from behind the commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_101.korean: 그 순간, 사령관의 등 뒤에서 거대한 그림자가 다가오는 것이 보였다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_102.english: Ah!! Soul Junk is behind me…! It’s dangerous!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_107.english: Was?! Was?! Wer zum Teufel bist du?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_108.english: Spit it out! Spit it out quickly! I said spit that person out!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_108.korean: 뱉어내! 어서 뱉어내! 그 사람을 뱉어내란 말이야!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_109.english: I finally found you…! I finally found the person who should be by my side…!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_109.korean: 이제야 찾았는데…! 겨우 곁에 있을 사람을 찾았는데…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_11.english: Commander, it would be good for you to rest for a while.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_11.korean: 사령관 씨는 잠시라도 쉬시는 게 좋겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_110.english: Jetzt... werde ich es nie wieder verlieren...!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_110.korean: 이젠... 두 번다시 잃지 않을 거야…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_115.english: Soul Junk is swarming into the camp! We have to protect the people!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_115.korean: 캠프로 소울정크가 몰려오고 있어! 사람들을 지켜야 해!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_116.english: It's okay, we'll figure it out ourselves.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_117.english: So don't worry... just wait here.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_12.english: If you take on too much work at once, your body won't be able to handle it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_12.korean: 한 번에 너무 많은 일을 떠안으면 몸이 버티지 못할 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_13.english: Please leave the rest to me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_15.english: I wish Lily could just get out of Desire without anything happening...
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_15.korean: - 이대로 아무 일 없이 릴리가 데자이어에서 벗어나면 좋겠는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_2.english: Falls es sich um Miss Lily handelt, befindet sie sich im Keller.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_20.english: How long do you plan to stay in this spot?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_20.korean: 언제까지 이 자리에 붙어 있을 생각이죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_21.english: Weil Lily mich gebeten hat, bei ihr zu bleiben.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_21.korean: 릴리 님이 같이 있어 달라고 하셨으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_22.english: He didn't say a single word like that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_22.korean: 그런 말은 한 마디도 하지 않았습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_24.english: … You must possess great insight. Of course, it looks completely useless, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_24.korean: …굉장한 통찰력을 지니셨나 보군요.&n물론 전혀 쓸모없어 보이지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_25.english: It doesn't look like he has any intention of going back.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_26.english: Or… did you receive an order from your master to stay by my side?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_26.korean: 아니면… 제 옆에 있으라는 주인의 명령이라도 받은 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_27.english: Der Meister hat keine Befehle erteilt.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_3.english: We haven't arrested them separately, but it looks like they will be quiet for the time being.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_3.korean: 따로 구속은 하지 않았습니다만, 당분간은 얌전할 것 같군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_31.english: Why is the story turning out that way?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_32.english: Der Meister ist ein wirklich guter Mensch.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_36.english: That's enough. I understand sufficiently just from that reaction.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_37.english: I haven't even told you all of your strengths yet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_37.korean: 아직 주인님의 장점을 다 말씀드린 것도 아닌데요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_38.english: It seems like there would be no end to listening to that, so I'll decline.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_38.korean: 그 얘기 듣다간 끝이 없을 것 같으니 사양할게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_39.english: In that case… what kind of person was Lily’s older brother?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_39.korean: 그렇다면… 릴리 님의 오라버니는 어떤 분이셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_4.english: I continue to stay by Miss Lily's side.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_4.korean: 릴리 양 곁을 계속 지키고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_40.english: Why should I tell you that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_40.korean: 제가 왜 그걸 당신에게 말해야 하죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_41.english: So then, to tell you about your good points again, Master…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_41.korean: 그럼, 다시 주인님의 좋은 점을 말씀드리자면…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_42.english: Verstanden! Verstanden, also halt den Mund!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_43.english: My older brother is a much cooler person than your master. Are you satisfied?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_43.korean: 제 오라버니는 당신 주인보다 훨씬 멋지신 분이랍니다.&n만족하셨나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_45.english: … If I were to tell you about your good points, Master—

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_46.english: Ah...! Really...! I get it...! Why do we have to compete over something like this?!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_46.korean: 아아…! 정말…! 알겠어요…!&n왜 이런 걸로 경쟁을 해야 하죠?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_47.english: I really feel like I become a fool when I'm with you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_47.korean: 정말 당신과 함께 있으면 저까지 바보가 되는 기분이에요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_48.english: … My older brother was kinder than anyone, and more affectionate than anyone.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_49.english: And always… you smiled at me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_5.english: We don't really talk, but just having someone by your side makes a difference.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_5.korean: 딱히 대화를 나누지는 않지만, 누군가 곁에 있어주는 것만으로도 달라지는 게 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_50.english: My older brother was that kind of person.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_51.english: So, Lily liked your older brother.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_53.english: Loving your family is perfectly natural, isn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_53.korean: 가족을 좋아하는 건 극히 자연스러운 거잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_54.english: Besides… I was still young back then.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_55.english: You speak as if you are all grown up now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_55.korean: 마치 지금은 다 큰 것처럼 말씀하시네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_56.english: I don't want to hear it from you, at least!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_57.english: Wirklich… sagt denn niemand in deinem Umfeld etwas zu dir?
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_57.korean: 정말… 주변에서 당신에게 뭐라하는 사람은 아무도 없나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_58.korean: 네, 아자즈는 언제나 제 말을 이해해 줘요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_6.english: Insbesondere in einer Situation wie dieser.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_60.english: Draculina always speaks loudly in anger, though.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_60.korean: 드라큐리나는 늘 큰 목소리로 화를 내지만요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_61.english: I might actually get along quite well with that person, surprisingly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_61.korean: 그분과는 의외로 마음이 잘 맞을지도 모르겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_62.english: Aber am Ende hilfst du mir doch immer.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_63.korean: 두 사람 다 제 소중한 친구예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_66.english: Oh, by any chance, may I call you Lily?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_68.english: Hmm... I guess this should be enough.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_69.english: I might be going a bit overboard, but...

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_7.english: It will be okay. At least for now, they aren't saying "kill me" or "I will kill you."
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_7.korean: 괜찮아질 겁니다.&n적어도 지금은 ‘죽여 달라’거나 ‘죽이겠다’는 말은 하지 않고 있으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_70.english: Well, since Mr. Nev is here, things should work out somehow.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_70.korean: 뭐, 네브 씨가 있으니 어떻게든 되겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_74.english: Mr. Nev! This is a big problem!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_76.english: Yes! But… this is really… impossible to explain!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_76.korean: 네! 그런데… 이건 정말… 도저히 설명할 수가 없군요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_77.english: An absurd number of Soul Junk are swarming in!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_77.korean: 말도 안 되는 숫자의 소울정크가 몰려오고 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_78.english: Hurry and evacuate the camp! I'll hold them off so they can't get in!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_78.korean: 서둘러 캠프 사람들을 대피시켜!&n나는 놈들이 들어오지 못하게 막고 있을 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_8.english: It is hard to call it a good state, but you have likely gained time to reflect on yourself and think.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_8.korean: 좋은 상태라고 부르긴 어렵지만, 자신을 되돌아보고 생각할 시간은 생겼을 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_80.english: Was in aller Welt wird da passieren?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_88.english: To think he just talks about himself and disappears… I really don't understand what on earth is so good about a man like that…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_88.korean: 자기 말만 하고 사라지다니… 도대체 저런 남자의 어디가 좋다는 건지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_89.english: Aber… eben habe ich diese Person herbeigerufen, um ihr etwas zu sagen…
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_89.korean: 그런데… 저는 방금, 저 사람을 불러세워서 무슨 말을 하려고…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_9.english: From now on, it will be up to Miss Lily's own choice.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_9.korean: 이제부터는 릴리 양 본인의 선택에 달렸겠지요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_90.english: Is it, "Don't worry... just wait here"?

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_92.english: Haha... Vielleicht bin ich wirklich zum Narren geworden.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_92.korean: 하하… 어쩌면 정말로 바보가 된 걸지도 모르겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_93.english: Amidst the chaos swarming with Soul Junk, Lily was desperately searching for something while cutting down the charging beasts.
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_93.korean: 소울정크가 들끓는 혼란 속에서, 릴리는 달려드는 짐승들을 베어 넘기며 무언가를 필사적으로 찾고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_94.english: Wo ist es…? Wo ist es?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_95.english: Get out of the way, you bugs! I don't have time for people like you!
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_95.korean: 저리 비키세요 이 벌레들!&n당신들 따위에게 할애할 시간 따윈 없습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_96.english: Ugh, what on earth is this... this anxiety...? This isn't like me... What on earth is so special about a guy like that... to the point of going this far...
LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_96.korean: 큭, 대체 뭐죠… 이 불안감은…?&n저답지 않아요… 그딴 사내가 대체 뭐라고… 이렇게까지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-5OP_98.english: Ah, that voice... it's from over there!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_103.english: Shirayuri, do you happen to know the name SHS?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_103.korean: 시라유리는 혹시 S. H. S. 라는 이름을 알아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_106.english: I'd like to ask Shirayuri for a favor too, if she's okay with it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_107.english: The place you enter is virtual reality, though.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_12.english: Yes, there were some unusual circumstances, but there were no urgent issues.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_12.korean: 네, 특이사항은 있었지만 급한 문제는 없었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_13.english: I came here today because I heard the doctor is here.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_13.korean: 오늘은 닥터가 이곳에 있다고 해서 찾아왔습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_15.english: I have a question to ask. If it's not a bother...
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_15.korean: 조금 질문할 게 있어서요. 혹시 방해가 된다면…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_17.english: What is the question? If it's a long story, shall we go to my lab?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_17.korean: 무슨 질문인데? 긴 얘기면 내 연구실로 갈까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_18.english: No, it's fine. It won't take long. Besides, I have to report to the Commander on intelligence activities anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_18.korean: 아뇨, 괜찮아요. 오래 걸리진 않을 거예요.&n마침 사령관님에게 첩보 활동에 대한 보고도 해야 하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_19.english: … This is the report on recent intelligence activities.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_2.english: The device is causing significant changes to the data internally.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_2.korean: 장치 내부에서 자체적으로 데이터의 큰 변화를 일으키고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_20.english: Alcatraz Fortress... I already knew the Ironworm were targeting that place.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_20.korean: 알카트라즈 요새라… 안 그래도 철충이 그곳을 노린다는 건 알고 있었는데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_21.english: Berichten zufolge scheint eine Kollision unvermeidbar.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_21.korean: 보고에 따르면 충돌은 피할 수 없을 것 같습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_23.english: Well then, I'll be leaving now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_24.english: Oppa, ich gehe jetzt auch. Du kommst doch heute Abend, oder?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_24.korean: 오빠, 나도 이제 그만 가볼게.&n오늘 밤에 올 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_25.english: Okay! I'll get it ready and wait!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_29.english: It seems you and the Commander have gotten along quite well since I last saw you, Doctor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_29.korean: 닥터는 잠깐 안 보는 사이 사령관님과 사이가 많이 좋아지셨군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_3.english: Yeah, it's probably due to the gameplay, but that doesn't mean you modified the data, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_3.korean: 응, 게임 플레이의 영향이겠지만 그렇다고 오빠가 데이터를 수정한 건 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_30.english: With you, Oppa? Hehehe~ I've been on good terms with you from the very beginning!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_30.korean: 오빠랑? 에헤헤~&n오빠 하고는 처음부터 사이가 좋았는 걸!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_32.english: - What is it...? I suddenly feel a cold stare coming from Shirayuri...
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_32.korean: - 뭐지…? 갑자기 시라유리에게서 싸늘한 시선이 느껴지는 것 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_35.english: - No, not yet... I can still get faster.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_35.korean: - 아니, 아직이야… 나는 아직 더 빨라질 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_36.english: At first, we could only process one case at a time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_36.korean: - 처음에는 한 건씩 밖에 처리할 수 없었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_37.english: However, as time went on, the amount that could be processed simultaneously increased to two or three.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_37.korean: - 하지만 시간이 지남에 따라 두 개, 세 개로 동시에 처리할 수 있는 양이 점점 늘어났다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_38.english: - Right now, I can handle about five cases simultaneously.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_38.korean: - 지금이라면 다섯 건 정도는 동시에 할 수 있다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_39.english: You might wonder how on earth you can do five at once, but anyway, it is five.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_39.korean: - 다섯 개를 동시에 라니 대체 어떻게 하는 건지 의문이 들 수 있지만, 어쨌든 다섯 개다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_4.english: It's not Azaz's fault. I even checked it properly!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_4.korean: 아자즈 언니의 잘못은 아니야.&n내가 제대로 확인까지 했는 걸!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_40.english: - Someday, ten, a hundred, a thousand! I will be able to do everything simultaneously just as I think!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_40.korean: - 언젠가 열 개, 백 개, 천 개! 생각대로 모든 일을 동시에 할 수 있게 되겠다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_43.english: I headed to the server room to proceed with the fourth record.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_43.korean: - 네 번째 기록을 진행하기 위해 서버실로 향했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_44.english: To think it's already the fourth time... It wouldn't have been possible without everyone's help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_44.korean: - 어느새 벌써 네 번째라니… 모두의 도움이 없었다면 불가능했겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_45.english: Come to think of it, I need someone to play games with today… hmm…
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_45.korean: - 그러고 보니 오늘은 함께 게임 할 누군가가… 음...

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_46.english: No, it's getting late, so maybe I should handle it alone today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_46.korean: - 아니, 시간도 늦었으니 오늘은 혼자서 진행하는 게 좋으려나.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_5.english: Anyway, I think it would be a good idea to track what data changes going forward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_5.korean: 아무튼, 앞으로는 어떤 데이터가 변하는지 추적해 두는 게 좋을 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_50.english: Ah, Oppa! Welcome! I've been waiting for you!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_51.english: You're going to start right away, right?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_53.english: Then, first, I'll put this on my brother...

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_55.english: But aren't you doing this with another older sister today?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_55.korean: 그런데 오늘은 다른 언니랑 같이 안 하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_57.english: Hehehe~ So I'm getting you all to myself today, huh?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_57.korean: 에헤헤~ 그럼 오늘은 나 혼자서 오빠를 독차지 하는 거네?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_59.english: Bruder, leg dich bequem aufs Bett.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_6.english: Yeah. But don't worry. There won't be any major problems playing just like you have so far.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_6.korean: 응. 그래도 걱정하지 마.&n지금까지처럼 플레이하는 데 큰 문제는 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_61.english: Na gut… dann fange ich an…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_64.english: Doctor! What on earth are you doing!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_64.korean: 닥터! 지금 대체 뭘 하는 거예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_66.english: Uh...? Doctor... Commander... What are you doing?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_66.korean: 어…? 닥터… 사령관님… 지금 뭐 하시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_67.english: Huh? What do you mean, what am I doing? It's a game.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_69.english: Although he has been frequently away recently due to intelligence activities, to think of such a misconception…
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_69.korean: 최근들어 첩보 활동으로 자주 자리를 비웠다고는 하나 이런 착각을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_7.english: - A major change in the data…

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_70.english: Normally I would have figured it out right away. It's pathetic.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_71.english: Oh my? Commander, do you think you are completely innocent?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_71.korean: 어머? 사령관님은 자신에게 아무런 죄가 없다고 생각하시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_72.english: I'm not entirely sure, but I'm glad the misunderstanding has been cleared up! By the way, what did Shirayuri-nee get into?
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_72.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만 오해가 풀렸다면 다행이야!&n그런데 시라유리 언니는 무슨 착각을 한 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_75.english: More importantly… is this the virtual reality game device? It’s quite big.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_75.korean: 그보다… 이게 그 가상현실 게임 장치인가요?&n상당히 크네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_76.english: This is the first I’ve heard of it. There was some intelligence activity related to the game industry, but it wasn’t my primary area of ​​responsibility.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_76.korean: 처음 듣습니다.&n게임 업계와 관련한 첩보 활동도 있었지만, 제가 담당했던 주요 영역은 아니었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_77.english: I am sorry I couldn't be of help.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_78.english: That's right! Then how about this?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_79.english: Diesmal geht Shirayuri-nee mit ihrem Bruder hinein!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_79.korean: 이번엔 시라유리 언니가 오빠랑 같이 들어가는 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_8.english: I have already cleared three records, but I actually know almost nothing about this virtual reality game.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_8.korean: - 벌써 세 개의 기록을 클리어했지만, 사실 이 가상현실 게임에 대해 아는 건 거의 없다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_81.english: That way, it will be easier for you to clear it, and I feel relieved having you by my side!
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_81.korean: 그 편이 오빠도 클리어하기 더 수월할 거고, 나도 언니가 옆에 있으면 안심돼!

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_83.english: Hehe, it’s been a really long time since I’ve taken on a stealth mission.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_83.korean: 후후, 정말 오랜만의 맡는 잠입 임무네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_85.english: I am Shirayuri from Agency 080. I will now begin the mission with the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_85.korean: 080기관 소속 시라유리, 지금부터 사령관님과 함께 임무를 시작하겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_86.english: There was a minor incident, but the fourth record began with Shirayuri.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_86.korean: - 작은 해프닝이 있었지만, 네 번째 기록은 시라유리와 함께 시작되었다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_89.english: Okay, I'll leave that part to the doctor.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_9.english: It would be nice if I could know even a little bit about the creator.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_9.korean: - 제작자의 대한 정보를 조금이라도 알 수 있다면 좋을 텐데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_91.english: Long time no see. Is your espionage work going well?

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_92.english: No, it's fine. We had just finished talking.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_92.korean: 아니야, 괜찮아. 마침 얘기가 끝난 참이었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_93.english: I guess I should go sooner or later. You worked hard, and I look forward to working with you in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_93.korean: 늦든 빠르든 가봐야겠지. 고생했어, 앞으로도 잘 부탁할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_94.english: Yeah, I'll come visit as soon as I finish work.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_94.korean: 응, 일이 끝나는 대로 찾아 갈게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_96.english: It would be nice to do it together, but I'm done for today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-6ED_96.korean: 같이 하는 것도 좋지만 오늘은 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_10.english: But one day, Lord suddenly went missing. As I tried to fill the void, I had no choice but to become the leader.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_10.korean: 그런데 어느 날, 로드가 갑자기 실종됐습니다.&n그 자리의 공백을 메우려다 보니 제가 리더가 될 수밖에 없었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_100.english: While that might be natural from a guardian's perspective, for Miss Iris, it is simply being treated as an unwelcome ward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_100.korean: 그게 보호자의 입장에선 당연할지 몰라도, 이리스 양에게는 달갑지 않은 피보호자 취급일 뿐입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_101.english: I mentioned a moment ago that Miss Iris's behavior is similar to that of a delinquent, didn't I? Ultimately, she hates those who give her orders or look down on her from above.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_101.korean: 조금 전에 이리스 양의 행동이 비행 청소년과 비슷하다고 말씀드렸죠?&n결국 자신에게 명령하거나 위에서 내려다보는 존재를 증오하는 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_102.english: Das ist wie ein Uhrwerkmechanismus... also wird er irgendwann kaputtgehen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_102.korean: 이건 맞물려 돌아가는 태엽 같아서… 언젠가 부서질 수밖에 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_103.english: It would be good to win Miss Iris's heart first, but that doesn't mean giving her blind support is advisable.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_103.korean: 먼저 이리스 양의 마음을 얻는 게 좋겠지만, 그렇다고 맹목적인 지지를 하는 건 바람직하지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_104.english: It is best to continue the conversation little by little, showing that you are an equal rather than a person of power.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_104.korean: 사령관님이 권력자가 아닌 대등한 존재라는 걸 보여주며, 조금씩 대화를 이어가는 게 최선입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_105.english: In that case, I suppose we should create an opportunity to talk first. It would be best to pretend it is a coincidence and be deployed on the same mission.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_105.korean: 그렇다면 우선 대화할 기회를 만들어야겠군요.&n우연을 가장해 같은 임무에 투입되는 게 좋겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_106.english: Falls erforderlich, werde ich ein solches Treffen arrangieren…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_108.english: … It’s nothing. I guess it was just my imagination.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_11.english: That is true. Looking back now… I might have relied on it too much.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_11.korean: 그렇습니다. 지금 돌이켜보면… 너무 의지했는지도 모르겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_111.english: Phew, your senses are really sharp.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_113.english: I knew they were investigating, but I never imagined it would be this bad.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_113.korean: 조사를 하고 있을 줄은 알았지만, 설마 이 정도일 줄이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_114.korean: 상황이 점점 저에게 안 좋게 흘러가고 있군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_115.english: Those two might really be able to lead Yuma in a good direction.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_115.korean: 저 두 사람이라면 정말로 유마 씨를 좋은 방향으로 이끌지도 모르겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_116.english: Haha, in that case, I suppose it would be best to strike first.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_116.korean: 후후, 그렇다면 그전에 선수를 치는 게 좋겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_117.english: Yuma, would you mind talking to me for a moment?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_117.korean: 유마 씨.&n잠시 저와 이야기 좀 해보시겠습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_118.english: Warum? Hat dir dieser Mistkerl gesagt, du sollst sofort verschwinden?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_118.korean: 왜? 여기서 당장 나가라고 그 자식이 말하기라도 했어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_12.english: I didn't realize Lord's absence would be this big.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_12.korean: 로드의 빈자리가 이렇게까지 클 줄은 몰랐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_120.english: … Well, I am well aware that even if I told Yuma to leave, he wouldn't be the type to just walk away obediently, but.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_120.korean: …뭐, 설령 나가라고 해도 유마 씨가 순순히 나가실 분이 아니란 것도 잘 알고 있습니다만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_121.english: If you know, get lost. I don't want to talk to a bat-like jerk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_121.korean: 알면 꺼져.&n박쥐같은 놈이랑 떠들고 싶지 않으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_122.english: Please don't refuse so harshly. This time, I've brought some information that might be helpful to you, Yuma.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_122.korean: 너무 그렇게 거절하지 마세요.&n이번에는 유마 씨에게도 도움이 될 만한 정보를 가져왔으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_123.english: Are you telling me to believe that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_124.english: Believe it or not, why don't you listen to it first and then decide?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_124.korean: 믿든 말든, 일단 들어보고 판단하시는 게 어떻습니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_125.english: Yeah, tell me. It’ll probably just be bullshit again anyway.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_126.english: Oh my goodness, what do you think of me! I don't crack jokes on important matters!
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_126.korean: 이런 이런, 절 뭘로 보시는 겁니까!&n중요한 용무엔 농담 같은 거 안 합니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_127.english: I get it, so hurry up and tell me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_128.english: An entire department store was sucked into the void. The people inside were annihilated by the Soul Junk... all that remains are supplies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_128.korean: 공백 내부로 백화점 하나가 통째로 빨려 들어왔습니다.&n그 안에 있던 사람들은 소울정크에게 전멸… 남은 건 물자뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_129.english: Some wandering camps entered with the intention of taking supplies, but the fighting grew larger and eventually escalated into a struggle between large camps.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_129.korean: 일부 유랑 캠프가 물자를 노리고 들어갔지만, 싸움이 커져 결국 대형 캠프 간의 쟁탈전으로 번지고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_130.english: Why are you telling me that? It's Tenebris's job to run the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_130.korean: 그걸 왜 나한테 말해?&n캠프를 움직이는 건 테네브리스 일이잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_131.english: What are you talking about? Now is the perfect opportunity to humble Mr. Nev!
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_131.korean: 무슨 말씀이십니까. 지금이야말로 네브 씨의 콧대를 꺾을 절호의 기회잖아요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_132.english: Yuma, weren't you already gathering people who were dissatisfied with the camp's operation? You really need to solidify your position with this opportunity.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_132.korean: 안 그래도 유마 씨는 캠프 운영에 불만이 있는 사람들을 모으고 계셨잖습니까?&n이번 기회에 확실히 입지를 굳히셔야죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_133.english: If you secure resources, influence will naturally follow. This is a golden opportunity!
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_133.korean: 물자를 확보하면 영향력은 자연스럽게 따라옵니다.&n이건 절호의 찬스라고요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_134.english: You keep talking like that, so you just look like a scammer.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_134.korean: 네가 그렇게 떠드니까 그냥 사기꾼 같아 보이는데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_135.english: That's disappointing! I am really serious! I am doing this to improve your relationship—
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_135.korean: 서운하군요! 전 정말 진지합니다!&n저는 두 분의 관계 개선을 위해서ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_138.english: The inside of the department store has turned into a battlefield…! A desperate situation where they have no choice but to rely on each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_138.korean: 전쟁터가 되어버린 백화점 내부…!&n서로를 의지할 수 밖에 없는 절체절명의 상황.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_139.english: "I guess it can't be helped. This is a temporary alliance just for now." "I haven't forgiven you yet!!" "We'll talk about such trivial matters later... I'm back!"
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_139.korean: 어쩔 수 없군. 이번만 임시 동맹이다.'&n'난 아직 널 용서한 게 아니라고!!'&n'그런 자잘한건 나중에 얘기하고… 온다!''

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_14.english: As the Commander mentioned before, everyone gets anxious when the leader wavers.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_14.korean: 전에 사령관 씨가 말씀하셨던 것처럼, 리더가 흔들리면 모두가 불안해하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_140.english: ...I was expecting a heated situation like that, you know.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_141.english: If you thought anything would get better with that kind of delusion, your brain must be rotten.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_141.korean: 그 따위 망상으로 뭐가 나아질 거라 생각했다면 뇌가 썩은 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_142.english: Anyway, it is true that department stores are overflowing with goods.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_142.korean: 어쨌든, 백화점에 물자가 넘쳐나는 건 사실입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_143.english: Since it is obvious that a fight will break out between the camps, how about cooperating with Mr. Nev this time?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_143.korean: 캠프들끼리 싸움이 벌어질 게 뻔하니, 이번만큼은 네브 씨와 협력하시는 게 어떨지요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_145.english: Well, we can't just sit around when we're running out of supplies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_145.korean: 뭐, 물자가 떨어져 있는데 손 놓고 있을 순 없지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_146.english: Oh, Yuma-san ist auch heimlich mit Neve-san zusammen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_146.korean: 오, 유마 씨도 내심 네브 씨와ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_148.english: … Then, are we going in the direction I suggested?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_149.english: I'm already sick of freeloading off Tenebris. If we keep doing this forever, we won't have any justification for making any demands.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_149.korean: 안 그래도 테네브리스한테 빌붙어 물자를 얻어먹는 건 이제 지겹거든.&n언제까지고 그 꼴이면 우리가 뭘 주장할 당위성도 없고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_15.english: … Thank you. Thank you for always listening to me.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_150.english: Establishing a foundation on my own is the priority.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_150.korean: 내 힘으로 기반부터 마련하는 게 먼저야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_152.english: I'll say it again: I have absolutely no intention of becoming friends with that guy. Just don't get in my way.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_152.korean: 다시 말하지만, 그 자식이랑 친해질 생각은 죽어도 없어.&n방해나 하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_153.english: Du gehst wirklich zu weit. Hast du denn absolut keine Absicht, den anderen zu verstehen?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_153.korean: 정말 너무하시네요. 상대를 이해해볼 마음은 조금도 없으십니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_154.english: I won't listen. I want to beat you up the moment I get the chance.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_155.english: … Haa. Then, let me ask you one last time. Why do you hate Mr. Nev that much?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_155.korean: …하아. 그럼 마지막으로 묻겠습니다.&n왜 그렇게까지 네브 씨를 싫어하시는 겁니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_156.english: How can I reconcile with Mr. Nev?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_156.korean: 어떻게 하면 네브 씨와 화해를 하실지ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_157.english: I don't like any of them, and I have no intention of getting close to them.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_157.korean: 전부 마음에 안 들고 친해질 생각도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_158.english: Stop being stubborn. Answer properly. Iris Yuma.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_158.korean: 고집만 부리지 마시고. 제대로 대답하세요.&n이리스 유마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_159.english: I have nothing more to say, so what am I supposed to do? I'm leaving, so don't talk to me anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_159.korean: 더 할 말이 없는데 어쩌라고.&n난 가볼 테니까 더 말 걸지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_16.english: Ahem, if possible, I would appreciate it if you didn't forget my existence.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_16.korean: 어흠, 가능하면 제 존재를 잊지 말아주셨으면 합니다만?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_161.english: … Still, well. Thanks to you, this battle will be fun.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_162.english: Are you worried about something again? Do you want something to drink?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_162.korean: 또 무슨 고민이라도 하고 있어? 뭐라도 마실래?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_163.english: It's not like you're struggling that much, is it?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_164.english: I can at least listen to you for now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_164.korean: 일단 들어주는 정도는 할 수 있는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_165.english: I guess you relied on me a lot.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_166.english: I don't think there is anything I need to say.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_166.korean: 아무래도 내가 해줘야 할 말은 없는 거 같은데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_167.english: Wait, it seems like neither of you are in a situation to have a proper conversation right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_167.korean: 잠깐, 두 사람 다… 지금은 제대로 대화할 수 있는 상황이 아닌 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_168.english: How about we talk about this separately later?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_168.korean: 나중에 따로 다시 이야기 하는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_17.english: And before I knew it... Of course, Kent, I'm always grateful to you too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_17.korean: 또 어느 틈에… 물론 켄트, 너한테도 항상 고맙게 생각하고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_170.english: Enemy… you mean the enemy you have to fight and defeat?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_170.korean: 적… 자신이 싸워 이겨야 하는 적 말이지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_171.english: It seemed like Iris was keeping too much of a distance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_171.korean: 이리스 쪽에서 지나치게 거리를 두는 것 같았거든.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_172.english: It feels like they don't even see you as a colleague anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_172.korean: 이제 널 동료로조차 보지 않는다는 느낌이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_173.english: Why does Iris hate you so much?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_173.korean: 이리스는 왜 그렇게 널 싫어하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_174.english: Don't we have to resolve this somehow?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_175.english: It's not like that... We're not going to keep fighting like this forever, are we?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_175.korean: 그런 게 아니고… 앞으로도 이렇게 계속 싸울 건 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_176.english: At the very least, you should clearly find out why they dislike it.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_177.english: Ah, Shirayuri is probably helping others right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_177.korean: 아, 시라유리는 지금 다른 사람들을 도와주고 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_178.english: It's okay, they're probably doing it because they like it. Probably…
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_178.korean: 괜찮아, 좋아서 하는 걸 거야. 아마도…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_18.english: It’s not just you. Miriam, who always heals everyone, and Ms. Shirayuri, who strives to lead the people in my place…
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_18.korean: 너뿐만이 아니야.&n항상 모두를 치료해 주는 미리엄, 저를 대신해 사람들을 이끌기 위해 노력해 주시는 '시라유리 씨'…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_180.english: I won't ask what's newly added to that notebook...
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_180.korean: 그 수첩에 뭐가 새로 추가됐는지는 묻지 않을게…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_181.english: So, what were the results of the investigation?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_182.english: You mean this many people have already gathered?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_183.english: Thanks for the inquiry. Are there any other notable points?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_183.korean: 조사 고마워. 그 밖에 특이사항은 없어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_184.english: Okay. I'll keep that in mind.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_185.english: And today… I’d like to have some counseling.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_188.english: The protagonist of the fourth record is Iris Yumaya.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_188.korean: 네 번째 기록의 주인공은 이리스 유마야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_189.english: So I tried to start by getting along well, but it’s not easy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_189.korean: 그래서 일단 사이좋게 지내는 것부터 시작해보려 했는데, 쉽지가 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_19.english: And Lily... she's doing better than I expected, living quite normally. Since Lord disappeared, everyone has been a great source of strength for me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_19.korean: 그리고 릴리도… 생각보다 평범하게 잘 지내고 있지.&n로드가 사라진 뒤, 모두가 내게 큰 힘이 되어주고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_190.english: Yeah, if possible, I'll ask you to do it peacefully.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_191.english: Is that why you're avoiding me even when I try to talk...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_191.korean: 그래서 내가 대화하려 해도 피하는 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_192.english: Is it because Tenebris tried to avoid Iris and keep his distance?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_192.korean: 테네브리스가 이리스를 피하고 거리를 두려 했으니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_194.english: Thanks to you, I think I have found a direction to move forward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_194.korean: 고마워, 덕분에 나아갈 방향이 잡힌 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_2.english: Ah, Commander... I'm fine. Please ask someone who is really thirsty to have something to drink.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_2.korean: 아, 사령관 씨… 전 괜찮습니다.&n마실 건 정말 목이 마른 사람에게 부탁드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_20.english: It looks like I'm not in that 'everyone'?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_21.english: You mentioned even Lily, the Desire Worker, but completely left me out. Is the leader being narrow-minded?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_21.korean: 데자이어 워커인 릴리조차 언급하면서 내 이름은 쏙 빼고.&n리더라는 분이 속 좁으시다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_23.english: Since you acted together with me today, if I had returned, you would have come with me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_23.korean: 오늘은 저와 함께 행동했으니 제가 돌아왔다면 같이 왔겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_24.english: Well, since they are bitter enemies, I understand why they are left out of the mention, but—
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_24.korean: 뭐, 서로 앙숙이니 언급에서 빠지는 것도 이해는 갑니다만—

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_25.english: Surely you aren't sulking because you felt left out, are you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_26.english: Seeing how narrow-minded and petty he was, even more than I expected, just increased my respect for the Jandi leader even more.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_26.korean: 생각 이상으로 속 좁고 쪼잔한 모습에 한층 더 잔디의 리더 아저씨에 대한 존경심이 높아졌을 뿐이지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_27.english: … Stop it, Kent. I'm the one who did something wrong.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_28.english: Mr. Nev, it is not good to insist that it is entirely your fault. Isn't this attention-seeking, haughty high school girl just nitpicking?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_28.korean: 네브 씨, 그렇게 자기 잘못이라고만 주장하는 건 좋지 않습니다.&n관심받고 싶어 하는 이 새침데기 여고생이 말꼬투리를 잡고 늘어질 뿐 아닙니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_3.english: Soulworker can survive without eating or drinking, because they need to conserve even the smallest of their remaining resources.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_3.korean: 소울워커는 먹고 마시지 않아도 버틸 수 있습니다.&n남은 물자를 조금이라도 아껴야하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_31.english: Please don't be angry, Iris. If there is anything you are upset about with me, tell me anytime. I will listen to everything.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_31.korean: 화 풀어 이리스.&n나한테 섭섭한 게 있다면 언제든 말해. 다 들어줄테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_32.english: Huh? Do I have to listen to everything? Who do you think you are, spouting off like you're looking down on me? Why don't you call your arrogant friends over and talk to them?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_32.korean: 하아? 다 들어줘?&n니가 뭔데 위에서 내려다보는 듯이 그런 말을 떠들어?&n니 잘난 친구들이나 불러서 얘기하지 그러냐?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_34.english: You like it, leading your own side all the time and cornering people like that, don't you? Fine, go ahead and try to handle it yourselves.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_34.korean: 그렇게 자기편들만 잔뜩 이끌고 사람을 몰아세우고 노니까 좋지?&n그래, 어디 한번 니들끼리 잘해보라고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_35.english: Wait a minute, I still have something I want to say.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_35.korean: 잠깐만, 아직 하고 싶은 말이 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_36.english: Hmph, fine. I have no intention of joining your group anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_36.korean: 흥, 됐어.&n어차피 난 니들 무리에 들어갈 생각 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_37.english: There were actually quite a few fights during the operation today. I suppose it would be best to talk after I regain my composure a bit.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_37.korean: 안그래도 오늘 작전 중에 여러모로 싸우는 일이 많았거든요.&n조금 침착을 되찾은 후에 이야기 하는 게 좋겠군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_38.english: … Iris, ich muss unbedingt mit dir reden. Bitte besuche mich, sobald es dir besser geht.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_38.korean: …이리스, 너와는 꼭 할 얘기가 있어.&n기분이 풀리면 언제든 찾아와 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_39.english: You crawl over here, you trash.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_4.english: That may be the case now, but since you never know what the future holds, it is best to save while you can.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_4.korean: 지금은 그렇습니다만, 나중엔 어떻게 될지 모르니 아낄 수 있을 때 아끼는 게 좋습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_41.english: It's okay. It's natural for anyone to feel down sometimes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_41.korean: 괜찮습니다.&n사람이라면 기분이 안 좋을 때도 있는 거니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_42.english: But we are really growing more distant day by day. It wasn't this bad when Road was around.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_42.korean: 하지만 정말 날이 갈수록 사이가 멀어지고 있습니다.&n로드가 있었을 땐 이 정도까지는 아니었죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_43.english: That means Lord played the role of a mediator to that extent.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_43.korean: 그만큼 로드가 중재자 역할을 했었다는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_44.english: Ah, but unlike before, you don't use that unpleasant honorifics with Neve anymore, do you? Considering that Yuma's motto is to only use informal language with people he likes...
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_44.korean: 아, 그래도 예전과 달리 네브 씨에게 그 기분 나쁜 존댓말은 안 쓰지 않습니까?&n유마 씨의 신조가 마음에 든 인간에게만 반말을 한다는 걸 생각했을 때…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_45.english: Ah, actually, isn't Yuma-san interested in Neve-san!? If so, it makes sense that he's playing hard to get like that!
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_45.korean: 앗, 사실 유마 씨는 네브 씨에게 마음이 있는 게 아닐까요!?&n그렇다면 저렇게 튕기는 것도 납득이 되네요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_46.english: The person that child speaks to casually—or rather, uninhibitedly—is someone they are close to. And there is one more thing.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_46.korean: 저 아이가 반말로 편하게… 라기보단 거침없이 말하는 상대는 친한 사람.&n그리고 또 한 가지가 더 있지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_48.english: … Far from being colleagues, they might not even see us as fellow human beings.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_48.korean: …동료는커녕, 같은 인간으로 보고 있지 않을지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_49.english: I think you don't like my policy for running the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_49.korean: 제가 캠프를 운영하는 방침이 마음에 들지 않은 거라 생각됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_50.english: Even so, it feels like you dislike me for no reason...
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_50.korean: - 아무리 그래도 너무 이유도 없이 싫어하는 느낌인데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_51.english: How... is it a bloody purge?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_52.english: I see... I've been neglecting Iris lately, using the excuse that I've had a lot of things to do, but I guess it's time to properly tie up loose ends.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_52.korean: 그렇군요… 이런저런 일이 많다는 핑계로 이리스한텐 그동안 소홀했는데,&n슬슬 확실하게 매듭을 지어야겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_53.english: Hehehe, is this a bloody purge?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_54.english: It's not like that... It looks like I'm going to be even busier for a while...
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_54.korean: 그런거 아니야…&n한동안 더 바빠질 것 같군요…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_55.english: Leave the management of the camp to me for the time being. You'd better stop worrying about other things and have a proper conversation with Yuma.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_55.korean: 캠프의 관리는 당분간 제게 맡겨두세요.&n다른 일은 신경 끄시고 유마 씨와 제대로 대화하는 게 좋을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_56.english: According to rumors, Yuma is already forming his own group. If left unchecked, it will definitely escalate into a major problem.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_56.korean: 소문에 따르면, 이미 유마 씨가 독자적인 그룹을 만들고 있다고 합니다.&n방치하면 분명 큰 문제로 번질 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_57.english: Okay. I'll try to resolve this before that happens.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_57.korean: 알았어. 그렇게 되기 전에 해결해 볼게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_58.english: Come to think of it… I don’t see Ms. Shirayuri today. Are you not acting together?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_58.korean: 그러고 보니… 오늘은 시라유리 씨가 보이지 않는군요.&n같이 행동하시는 게 아닌 겁니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_59.english: Is that so? I am truly grateful to Ms. Shirayuri.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_6.english: As expected… you can’t fool the Commander’s eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_6.korean: 역시… 사령관 씨의 눈은 속일 수 없군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_60.english: Thanks to you, the various complaints, big and small, at the camp have been resolved.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_60.korean: 덕분에 캠프에 있던 크고 작은 불만들이 해결되었습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_61.english: That was originally my job to do... I'm sorry.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_61.korean: 원래라면 제가 해야 할 일이었는데… 죄송하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_64.english: Ahaha, it's nothing! Well then, I'll be going now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_64.korean: 아하하, 아무것도 아닙니다!&n그럼 저도 이만 가보겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_65.english: Okay, let's all think about Iris's problem together soon.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_65.korean: 그래, 이리스의 문제는 조만간 다 같이 고민해 보자.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_66.english: So, what do you think? I believe the problem is solved with this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_66.korean: 자, 어떠신가요? 이걸로 문제는 해결되었다고 생각합니다만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_67.english: Oh, ah… Yes! Thank you! I have no more complaints about this either!
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_67.korean: 앗, 아… 네! 감사합니다!&n이거라면 저도 더는 불만 없습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_69.english: However, I hope that such immoral acts will not be repeated in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_69.korean: 다만, 다음부터는 이런 부도덕한 일이 반복되지 않았으면 좋겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_7.english: I explained to the Commander that I was the leader of the Grass Blanket Camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_7.korean: 사령관 씨에게는 제가 잔디이불 캠프의 리더라고 설명해드렸죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_70.english: If the same thing happens again… you know exactly what will happen, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_70.korean: 만약 또 같은 일이 일어난다면… 잘 아시겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_73.english: … With this, the cleanup is almost finished.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_74.english: Oh my, I didn't do anything that would cause a problem.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_74.korean: 어머, 전 문제될 일은 하지 않았는걸요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_75.english: Rather, I solved the problems that the people here had.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_75.korean: 오히려, 여기 계신 분들이 가지고 있는 문제들을 해결해드렸죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_76.english: Yes. The preliminary investigation into the group Ms. Iris is forming is complete.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_76.korean: 네. 이리스 양이 만들고 있는 그룹에 대해 대략적인 조사가 끝났습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_77.english: Here is the list and brief personal information.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_77.korean: 여기 그 명단과 간단한 개인 정보입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_78.english: Anfangs stellten sie nur eine kleine Minderheit dar, doch in letzter Zeit hat ihre Zahl stetig zugenommen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_78.korean: 처음엔 소수에 불과했지만, 최근 들어 그 수가 점점 늘고 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_79.english: Dividing the organization at a time like this is not viewed favorably, but... there are more people who sympathize with Miss Iris's ideology than I thought.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_79.korean: 지금 같은 시기에 조직을 분열시키는 건 좋게 볼 수 없지만…&n이리스 양의 이념에 공감하는 사람들이 생각보다 많더군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_8.english: However, I was not the original leader.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_80.english: I'm not sure if I should call this a special feature... but there is one person worth keeping an eye on.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_80.korean: 특이사항…이라 해야 할지 모르겠습니다만, 한 사람 눈여겨볼 대상이 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_81.english: Seit ich mit dem Kommandanten hier angekommen bin, habe ich mich unter den Leuten im Lager umgesehen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_81.korean: 사령관님과 이곳에 들어온 이후, 캠프 사람들을 살펴봤습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_82.english: Among them, there was just one person… who didn't show a single weakness.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_82.korean: 그중 단 한 명… 전혀 틈을 보이지 않는 인물이 있더군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_83.english: - If it is a person who shows absolutely no weakness…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_84.english: This is a man named Kent. I don't know what his ulterior motive is, but I think you should be careful of this person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_84.korean: 켄트라는 자입니다.&n무슨 꿍꿍이가 있는지 알 수 없지만, 이 인물은 조심하시는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_85.english: So it's Kent, after all. I've thought for a while that he was a bit off-putting, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_85.korean: - 역시 켄트인가. 전 부터 위화감이 있는 인물이라고 생각은 했지만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_86.english: Es geht also um Miss Iris Yuma.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_87.english: Hehe, I don't know everything. I only know what I know.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_87.korean: 후후, 뭐든 아는 건 아니에요.&n아는 것만 알고 있을 뿐이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_88.english: The fact that the Commander specifically brought up Miss Iris here means…
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_88.korean: 사령관님이 굳이 이 자리에서 이리스 양 이야기를 꺼냈다는 건…

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_89.english: Then… the goal of this record is to prevent Miss Iris from becoming a Desire Worker.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_89.korean: 그렇다면… 이번 기록의 목표는 이리스 양이 데자이어 워커가 되지 않도록 막는 것이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_9.english: My friend, who was called 'Lord,' was the leader here.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_9.korean: 로드'라 불리던 제 친구가 이곳의 리더였죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_90.english: I see... I think thoroughly crushing Miss Iris is the quickest and surest way, but that isn't the method you want, Commander, is it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_90.korean: 그렇군요… 제 생각에는 이리스 양을 철저히 꺾어버리는 것이 가장 빠르고 확실한 방법입니다만, 사령관님께서 원하시는 방식은 아니겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_92.english: You can get closer to an ordinary person by showing them qualities that they admire or respect.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_92.korean: 보통 사람이라면 동경 혹은 존경할 만한 모습을 보여주는 걸로 가까워질 수 있습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_93.english: However, Miss Iris is negative about the act of looking up at others itself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_93.korean: 하지만 이리스 양은 타인을 올려다보는 그 행위 자체에 부정적이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_94.english: He is just like a delinquent teenager going through puberty. He shows an extreme aversion, especially toward powerful figures like Mr. Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_94.korean: 마치 사춘기의 비행 청소년 같죠.&n특히 테네브리스 씨와 같은 권력자에겐 극도의 거부반응을 보입니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_95.english: - Aus Iris' Sicht wirke ich wahrscheinlich wie eine Machtfigur, genau wie Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_95.korean: - 이리스 입장에서 본다면 나 역시 테네브리스와 마찬가지로 권력자의 모습으로 보이는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_96.english: It would be best to organize this in order. First, Commander, why do you think Miss Iris dislikes Mr. Tenebris?
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_96.korean: 차례대로 정리하는 게 좋겠네요.&n먼저 사령관님은 왜 이리스 양이 테네브리스 씨를 싫어한다고 생각하시나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_97.english: At that level, we are just strangers. That is not a reason to dislike each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_97.korean: 그 정도라면 그저 남남일 뿐입니다.&n싫어할 이유가 되진 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_98.english: From my perspective, I think the reason Miss Iris dislikes Mr. Tenebris is because of his position as a leader.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_98.korean: 제가 보았을 때 이리스 양이 테네브리스 씨를 싫어하는 이유는 리더라는 입장 때문이라고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_99.english: Miss Iris has a very strong sense of pride. However, Mr. Tenebris always forces orders under the guise of advice.
LastCorruptedRecord2-7ED_99.korean: 이리스 양은 자존심이 매우 강합니다.&n그런데 테네브리스 씨는 항상 조언이라는 이름으로 지시를 강요하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_10.english: Feiger Abschaum... Jemand wie du ist weder Gerechtigkeit noch sonst etwas.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_10.korean: 비겁한 쓰레기…&n너 같은 건 정의도 뭣도 아니야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_11.english: Miss Iris! Stop it! I really didn't mean to do that to Mr. Tenebris!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_11.korean: 이리스 양! 그만하세요!&n테네브리스 씨에게는 정말로 그럴 생각이 없었어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_12.english: Are you defending her again? Yeah, it's always like that, isn't it? You're just busy making me out to be the bad guy, aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_12.korean: 넌 또 저걸 감싸고 도는 거야?&n그래, 항상 그런식이지? 나만 나쁜년 만들기 바쁘지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_13.english: You're just like them! Do you end up looking alike if you hang out together?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_13.korean: 너도 저것들이랑 똑같아!&n같이 어울리고 다니면 서로 닮기라도 하나봐?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_14.english: ...This is the final warning. Please stop.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_15.english: Why? If you don't stop, are you going to hit me? Hit me! I said hit me!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_15.korean: 왜? 그만 안 하면 치기라도 할 거야?&n쳐봐! 쳐보라고!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_18.english: Miss Iris... I'm disappointed in you.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_19.english: They don't think about others at all, only about themselves.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_19.korean: 남의 생각은 하나도 안 하고 자기 생각만 하죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_2.english: Calm down! Iris… This isn't my doing…
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_2.korean: 진정해! 이리스…&n이건 내가 한 짓이 아니야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_20.english: Do you know how much everyone is agonizing over how to be with you, despite your self-centeredness?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_20.korean: 모두가 제멋대로인 당신과 어떻게 해서든 함께하기 위해 얼마나 많은 고민을 하고 있는지 알고 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_21.english: Your current behavior is no different from that of a trashy thug.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_21.korean: 지금 당신의 행동은 쓰레기 양아치와 다를 바가 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_22.english: Trash…? You said…? Don't make me laugh...! You guys are the trash for making me trash!! You sons of bitches!!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_22.korean: 쓰레기…? 쓰레기라고…? 웃기지 마...!&n날 쓰레기로 만들어낸 니들이 쓰레기야!! 이 개 같은 자식들아!!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_23.english: You all…! Every single one of you…!! I’ll kill you!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_3.english: Don't pretend you don't know, you disgusting bastard! Just say you wanted to kill me instead!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_3.korean: 모르는 척 하지마 역겨운 개자식아!&n차라리 날 죽이고 싶었다고 해!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_4.english: I should have realized it from the moment you suddenly changed your attitude. I was foolish to trust you even a little!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_4.korean: 네가 갑자기 태도를 바꿨을 때부터 눈치챘어야 했어.&n널 조금이라도 믿는 내가 어리석었지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_5.english: You're seriously mistaken about something... so... please listen to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_5.korean: 뭔가 단단히 착각하고 있다고… 그러니까… 제발 내 말 좀 들어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_6.english: A misunderstanding? Are you planning to dismiss this as a misunderstanding?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_7.english: They're already dead. They all died because of you!!!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_7.korean: 이미 죽었어. 다 너 때문에 죽었다고!!!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_8.english: You dug a trap and killed him, didn't you? I know everything.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_8.korean: 네가 함정을 파서 죽인거잖아.&n난 다 알고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_9.english: Du bringst jemanden um, nur weil ich dich ein bisschen nerve?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8ED_9.korean: 내가 좀 거슬린다고 이딴식으로 사람을 죽여?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_10.english: Don't get the wrong idea. I'm just going to gather the necessary supplies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_10.korean: 착각하지 마.&n어디까지나 필요한 물자를 챙기러 가는 거니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_100.english: It's just that things aren't going well right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_100.korean: 지금은 단지 그게 잘 안 풀리고 있을 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_101.english: Commander, isn't that why you are helping Mr. Tenebris?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_101.korean: 사령관님도 그걸 아시기에 테네브리스 씨의 옆에서 도와주고 계신 게 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_102.english: Then that is the problem. Just because things aren't going well, they don't do anything properly and are only busy stepping in.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_102.korean: 그럼 그게 문제지.&n잘 안 풀린다고 해서 제대로 하는 것도 없고 나서기만 바쁘고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_103.english: If you aren't even confident enough to act like a commanding leader, you should just stay quiet.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_103.korean: 명령하는 리더 짓거리조차 자신 없으면 그냥 가만히 짜져있어야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_104.english: … If even we don't understand their efforts, who will? Wouldn't that be the only way to achieve good results?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_104.korean: …저희라도 그 노력을 이해해주지 않으면 누가 알아주겠어요.&n그래야 좋은 결과도 나올 수 있지 않겠어요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_105.english: Then what if someone comes along who puts in the effort and produces results? If another leader emerges, you wouldn't have anything to say, would you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_105.korean: 그럼 노력도 하고 결과도 내는 사람이 나오면 어때?&n또 다른 리더가 나온다면 너도 할 말은 없겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_106.english: What? Well... that would be only natural if someone emerged whom everyone acknowledged, but...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_106.korean: 네? 그건 그야… 모두가 인정할 정도의 사람이 나온다면 당연하겠습니다만…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_107.english: Good, you said it clearly with your own mouth. You said you would obey someone better than that idiot if they appeared.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_107.korean: 좋아, 네 입으로 확실히 말했다.&n그 멍청이보다 나은 사람이 나오면 그 사람한테 복종하겠다고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_108.english: Was that what you were talking about?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_109.english: And I said I would obey—

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_110.english: Well, just wait and see. I’ll be the one to take away that Tenebris bubble myself soon.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_110.korean: 뭐, 두고 봐.&n곧 내가 그 테네브리스의 거품을 직접 거둬 낼 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_112.english: Fortunately, we made it into the department store without any major problems. Let's just grab our supplies and head out.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_112.korean: 다행히 큰 문제 없이 백화점에 들어왔군.&n이대로 물자만 챙겨서 나가자.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_113.english: Es ist eine Erleichterung, dass niemand verletzt wurde.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_114.english: It would have been faster if I had just smashed it up earlier, so I wasted time.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_114.korean: 진작 때려 부수고 왔으면 더 빨랐을 텐데 시간 낭비한 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_115.english: Everything worked out well, so there's no need to be negative, right? Let's keep going strong until the end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_115.korean: 전부 잘 풀렸으니 부정적일 필요는 없잖아요?&n이대로 마지막까지 힘내보죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_116.english: Right, we have to make sure we get what we need. We'll use what I packed as promised, so don't complain.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_116.korean: 그래, 챙길 건 챙겨야지.&n약속한 대로 내가 챙긴 건 우리가 쓸 테니까 불평하지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_117.english: That's fine. ...But there's something I'd like to talk to you about for a moment. Could you spare some time?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_117.korean: 그건 괜찮아.&n…대신 잠시 하고 싶은 이야기가 있는데, 시간 좀 내줄 수 있을까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_118.english: Conversation? You're just getting in the way, so why don't you just quit?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_119.english: It really won't take long. You can consider this the last time, so I'm asking for your help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_119.korean: 정말 잠깐이면 돼.&n마지막이라 생각해도 좋으니까 부탁할게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_121.english: Aaaah!!! Soul Junk is swarming in!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_122.english: What's going on!? Soul Junk is suddenly swarming in?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_123.english: Kommandant! Es ist eine Katastrophe! Eine riesige Horde Seelenschrott quillt aus dem Stockwerk darunter hervor!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_123.korean: 사령관님! 큰일이에요!&n어마어마한 소울정크 무리가 밑에 층에서 올라오고 있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_124.english: Could it be that Soul Junk was setting a trap in this department store!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_124.korean: 설마 소울정크가 이 백화점에 함정을 치고 있었나!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_125.english: I agree. I'll lead the way, so let's get out of the department store right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_125.korean: 동의합니다.&n모두 내가 앞장설 테니 이대로 백화점 밖으로 빠져나간다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_126.english: What!? You're going to run away? Then what are you going to do about the supplies!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_127.english: This isn't the time to be worrying about that. If you push yourself too hard, many people could die.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_127.korean: 지금 그런 걸 신경 쓸 때가 아니잖아.&n무리하다간 많은 사람이 죽을 수도 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_128.english: Did you go through all this trouble just to come all the way here empty-handed and get nothing? You're always busy running away while making a fuss about who's going to die, aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_128.korean: 아무것도 못 얻고 빈손으로 돌아가려고 힘들게 여기까지 들어온 거야?&n항상 그렇게 누가 죽네 마네 하면서 내빼기만 바쁘지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_13.english: … Was guckst du denn so breit grinsend an?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_130.english: … Miss Shirayuri, how many Soul Junk do you have?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_130.korean: …시라유리 양, 소울정크의 수는 어느 정도 입니까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_131.english: I'm not entirely sure, but it looks like well over a hundred.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_131.korean: 확실하지는 않지만, 백은 족히 넘어 보여요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_132.english: An dem, was Iris sagt, ist etwas Wahres dran. Manchmal ist es vielleicht notwendig, sich auf jemanden zu verlassen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_132.korean: 이리스의 말에도 일리는 있습니다.&n가끔은 의지하는 게 필요할지도 모릅니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_133.english: Don't worry. I will definitely protect everyone.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_134.english: Iris, we'll go downstairs and stop the Soul Junk from coming up.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_134.korean: 이리스, 우린 아래층으로 내려가 소울정크가 올라오지 못하도록 막을 게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_135.english: In the meantime, you guys go upstairs and gather the supplies. Is this okay?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_135.korean: 그동안 너희가 위층으로 올라가서 물자를 챙겨줘.&n이걸로 괜찮아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_136.english: Was… warum bist du ausnahmsweise mal so gehorsam?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_137.english: I'm just trying to respect your opinion.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_138.english: … Even if you say that, we will divide the supplies accurately!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_139.english: That's fine. If you want, you can take more.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_139.korean: 그걸로 괜찮아.&n뭣 하면 더 가져가도 상관없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_14.english: Hehe, it's nothing. I was just glad that Miss Iris came.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_14.korean: 후후, 아무것도 아니에요.&n이렇게 이리스 양이 와주셔서 다행이라고 생각했을 뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_140.english: Hmph... Everyone follow me! We're going up to grab supplies!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_140.korean: 흥… 모두 따라와!&n우리는 위로 올라가 물자를 챙긴다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_142.english: Hehe, I think it wasn't a bad choice. Miss Iris will probably see Mr. Tenebris in a new light as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_142.korean: 후후, 나쁘지 않은 선택이었다고 전 생각해요.&n이리스 양도 조금은 테네브리스 씨를 다시 보게 될 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_143.english: However, to prove that this decision was right, we must stop the swarming Soul Junk.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_143.korean: 하지만 이 결정이 옳았다는 걸 증명하려면 몰려오는 소울정크를 막아내지 않으면 안 됩니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_144.english: Thank you. Then let's go! We just have to hold out until Iris gathers the supplies and comes down.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_144.korean: 고맙습니다.&n그럼 가보죠! 이리스가 물자를 챙기고 내려올 때까지 버티는 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_145.english: Frau Iris! Das ist ja fantastisch! Das ist ja ein riesiger Vorrat! Damit kommen wir mehrere Monate aus!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_145.korean: 이리스 씨! 굉장해요! 엄청난 물자입니다!&n이거라면 몇 달은 버틸 수 있습니다!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_146.english: Sister Iris! Come over here quickly! Everyone has packed their bags to the brim! No one will be able to complain about this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_146.korean: 이리스 언니! 빨리 이쪽으로 오세요!&n다들 가방 한가득 챙겼어요! 이거라면 누구도 불평 못 할 거예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_147.english: Hehe, okay! Let's head back and throw a party!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_148.english: By the way, Iris, what are you going to do going forward?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_148.korean: 그런데 이리스 언니, 앞으로는 어떻게 하실 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_15.english: … This is strictly a personal matter, so don't get the wrong idea. Also, all the supplies I packed are for us. Just keep that in mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_15.korean: …어디까지나 개인적인 일이니까 착각하지 마.&n그리고 내가 챙긴 물자는 전부 우리 쪽 몫이야. 그렇게 알아둬.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_150.english: I'm talking about Mr. Tenebris! We gathered here because we don't like your management policies, Mr. Tenebris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_150.korean: 테네브리스 씨 말이에요!&n저희는 테네브리스 씨의 운영 방침이 마음에 들지 않아서 이렇게 모인 거잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_151.english: But if you accept opinions like today... I'm wondering if there's really a need to divide the groups like this.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_151.korean: 근데 오늘처럼 의견을 받아주면… 굳이 이렇게 그룹을 나눌 필요가 있나 싶어서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_152.english: You little rascal! Are you thinking of betraying me right away just because you showed a decent side once?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_152.korean: 요녀석~! 한 번 괜찮은 모습 보였다고 바로 배신할 생각이야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_153.english: Ah, no! That's not what I meant! I still think Iris is more suitable to be the leader!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_153.korean: 아, 아뇨! 그런 뜻이 아니에요!&n저는 여전히 이리스 언니가 리더로 더 적합하다고 생각해요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_154.english: It's just... I wanted to avoid an unnecessary fight.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_154.korean: 단지… 불필요한 싸움은 피할 수 있었으면 해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_155.english: … Okay. I’ll think about it. I’m not planning to fight blindly, either.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_155.korean: …알았어. 생각은 해볼게.&n나도 무작정 싸울 생각은 아니니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_156.english: Hehe, as expected, Iris is the best!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_157.english: Then for now, get out of here quickly.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_158.english: Ms. Iris! It's Soul Junk! Soul Junk are pouring down from upstairs! There are a huge number of them!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_158.korean: 이리스 씨! 소울정크 입니다!&n위층에서 소울정크들이 쏟아져 내려오고 있어요! 엄청난 수예요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_159.english: W-was? Wie ist Soul Junk von da oben hergekommen?!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_16.english: I hate it. Why on earth do I have to cooperate with that guy?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_16.korean: 싫어.&n도대체 내가 왜 저 자식이랑 협력해야 하는데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_161.english: Sister Iris! What should we do!? Soul Junk is blocking the stairs down too!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_161.korean: 이리스 언니! 어쩌죠!?&n밑 계단에도 소울정크가 막고 있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_162.english: Mo-Everyone run away! I'll hold this place!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_162.korean: 모, 모두 도망쳐!&n여긴 내가 막고 있을게!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_164.english: No, Iris! You have to lead the people out! If you don't take the lead, everyone will scatter!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_164.korean: 안 돼, 이리스! 네가 사람들을 데리고 나가야지!&n네가 앞장서지 않으면 다 흩어지고 말 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_165.english: You ended up coming here because of me! Then I'll take full responsibility to the end—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_165.korean: 여긴 나때문에 오게 됐어!&n그럼 내가 끝까지 책임을 지고ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_166.english: Don't talk nonsense! If you die here, what will become of us who went to all the trouble to gather here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_166.korean: 바보같은 소리 하지 마!&n네가 이런데서 죽으면 기껏 모인 우리는 뭐가 되는데!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_167.english: We all united with one heart and mind because we like you, didn't we? If we die, we're just casualties. But if you die, everyone will be sad.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_167.korean: 다들 네가 좋아서 한마음 한뜻으로 뭉친 거잖아.&n우리야 죽으면 그냥 발생한 사망자인데. 네가 죽으면 모두 슬퍼할 거라고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_168.english: Also keine Sorge, geh runter! Es ist keine Zeit zu verlieren, beeil dich!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_168.korean: 그러니까 신경 쓰지 말고 내려가!&n시간 없어, 빨리!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_169.english: Ugh... Damn it! Everyone follow me! I'll clear a path no matter what!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_169.korean: 큭… 젠장! 모두 날 따라와! 내가 어떻게든 길을 열겠어!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_17.english: Iris, listen calmly. I know how you feel, but this time, it is right to cooperate.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_17.korean: 이리스, 침착하게 들어봐. 네 기분은 알지만 이번만은 협력하는 게 옳아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_170.english: … How on earth did it end up like this?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_171.english: This can't be... This can't be happening...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_171.korean: 이럴 리가 없는데… 이렇게 될 리가 없는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_172.english: Why did everyone die...? What on earth did I do wrong?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_172.korean: 왜 다 죽었지…? 내가 대체 뭘 잘못했다고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_173.english: … Ah. Stimmt. Das ist richtig. Das liegt an diesem Kerl.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_174.english: Tenebris…! Come to think of it, everything turned out this way because of that guy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_174.korean: 테네브리스…!&n생각해보면 모든 게 그 자식 때문에 이렇게 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_175.english: That bastard sent us here, and he was the one who sent us upstairs.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_175.korean: 그 자식이 우리를 이곳으로 보냈고,&n위층으로 올려 보낸 것도 그 자식이었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_176.english: That bastard sent us here even though he knew the Soul Junk had dug a trap and was waiting.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_176.korean: 그 자식은 소울정크들이 함정을 파고 기다리고 있었다는 걸 알면서도 우리를 이곳에 보낸 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_177.english: To get rid of us who are getting in the way of the camp!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_179.english: Dieser Mistkerl… ich bringe ihn um…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_18.english: You have every right to say such things when you haven't even properly cooperated until now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_18.korean: 이제껏 제대로 협력한 적도 없으면서 잘도 그런 소리를 하네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_181.english: Iris, I'm glad you're safe. Fortunately, we didn't suffer any major damage.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_181.korean: 이리스, 무사했구나.&n다행히 우리 쪽에는 큰 피해가 없었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_182.english: A relief? What's so fortunate about it? You must be really disappointed that I came back alive.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_182.korean: 다행? 뭐가 다행인데?&n내가 살아 돌아와서 많이 아쉬운가 보네?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_183.english: What do you mean by "it's a shame"? Wait, so few people returned... What happened to the others?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_183.korean: 아쉽다니 무슨 말이야?&n잠깐, 돌아온 인원이 적은데... 다른 사람들은 어떻게 된 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_184.english: Ha! Are you really asking because you don't know?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_186.english: Yeah, I was completely helpless. They intended to kill everyone, so it must be a shame that so many survived.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_186.korean: 그래, 꼼짝없이 당했어.&n모두 죽이려고 했는데, 이렇게나 살아남아서 아쉽겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_188.english: You ordered this, didn't you? You made me come here, didn't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_188.korean: 네가 시킨 거지?&n네가 날 여기로 오게 만든 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_190.english: Don't play innocent! You sent us up here even though you knew Soul Junk had set a trap and was waiting!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_190.korean: 시치미 떼지 마!&n소울정크가 함정을 파고 기다린다는 걸 알면서도 네가 우리를 위로 올려보냈잖아!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_191.english: Of course, it's because I bothered you! You were afraid of me building up my power and increasing my strength, weren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_191.korean: 그야 내가 거슬렸으니까!&n내가 세력을 만들고, 힘을 키우는 게 두려웠지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_192.english: So that's why you intended to half-kill them or wipe them all out! Seriously... you're really smart!?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_192.korean: 그러니까 반쯤 죽이거나 전부 없앨 속셈이었던 거겠지!&n진짜… 머리가 잘 돌아가네!?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_193.english: Miss Iris, please calm down for now. She is quite sensitive right now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_193.korean: 이리스 양, 일단 진정해요.&n지금 상당히 예민한 상태예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_194.english: No, I'm perfectly rational! Everyone died because of that bastard, and I almost died too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_194.korean: 아니, 난 충분히 이성적이야!&n저 자식 때문에 다 죽고 나까지 죽을 뻔했어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_195.english: So I have to kill him before he dies. If I don't kill him, I'll die...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_195.korean: 그러니까 죽기 전에 죽여야 돼, 안 죽이면 내가 죽어…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_198.english: The department store setup is finished.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_199.english: Okay. Then are we leaving right away?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_201.english: Then we will compete with each other.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_202.english: Wouldn't it be better to cooperate just this once to obtain supplies and share them fairly?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_202.korean: 이번만은 협력해서 물자를 얻고, 공평하게 나누는 게 좋지 않을까?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_203.english: Iris, there is no need to argue like this before we even start.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_203.korean: 이리스, 시작하기도 전에 이렇게 다툴 필요는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_204.english: You want to get as much supply as possible, too, don't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_204.korean: 너도 조금이라도 많은 물자를 얻고 싶은 거잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_205.english: Yeah, I hope things work out well like this, but...

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_206.english: Come to think of it, what about Kent?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_207.english: It's dangerous if the exit is blocked! We have to get out right now!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_207.korean: 출구를 봉쇄당하면 위험해! 당장 빠져나가야 해!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_209.english: Don't worry about that, I'm here.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_21.english: Now, don't do that, listen carefully, Iris.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_21.korean: 자, 그러지 말고, 이리스 잘 들어봐.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_210.english: Iris, calm down. Tenebris has no reason to do that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_210.korean: 이리스 진정해. 테네브리스에게는 그럴 이유가 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_22.english: We are cooperating solely to maximize our mutual benefits. We have absolutely no other intentions.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_22.korean: 우리가 협력하는 건 어디까지나 서로 최대의 이익을 얻기 위한 거야.&n다른 의도는 전혀 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_23.english: The department store we are heading to is already swarming with camps eyeing supplies. It started as a dispute between wandering camps, but now it has escalated into a conflict between large garrison camps.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_23.korean: 지금 우리가 가려는 백화점은 물자를 노리는 캠프들로 이미 들끓고 있어.&n처음엔 유랑 캠프 간의 다툼이었지만, 지금은 대형 주둔 캠프끼리의 분쟁으로 번졌지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_24.english: It would be nice if this could be resolved through dialogue or negotiation, but the situation doesn't seem to allow for that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_24.korean: 대화나 협상으로 해결되면 좋을 텐데, 상황이 그렇지 못하군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_25.english: A large garrison camp has over a hundred personnel alone. No matter how abundant the supplies are, they won't last long.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_25.korean: 대형 주둔 캠프는 인원만 해도 백 명 이상.&n아무리 백화점 물자라 해도 오래 버티진 못해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_26.english: Then why don't you take Lily with you, too? Isn't that why you brought her along?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_26.korean: 그럼 릴리도 데려가지 그래? 이럴 때 쓰려고 데려다 놓은 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_27.english: No matter how friendly Lily is to us, it is still too early to involve her in a fight with people.
