LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_27.korean: 릴리가 아무리 우리에게 호의적이라 해도, 아직 사람과의 싸움에 관여시키기에는 일러.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_28.english: There might still be some other camps that view Lily as a Desire Walker. If that happens, you will turn all the other camps into enemies.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_28.korean: 다른 캠프에서는 아직 릴리를 데자이어 워커로 보는 곳도 있을 테니까.&n그렇게 되면 다른 모든 캠프를 적으로 돌리게 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_29.english: Ultimately, the power we have gathered right now is all we can use. If we have to face off against other camps, it would be best to at least cooperate among ourselves.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_29.korean: 결국 우리가 쓸 수 있는 전력은 지금 모인 이 정도뿐.&n다른 캠프와 맞붙는다면 최소한 우리끼리라도 협력하는 게 좋아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_3.english: Okay. I hope Ms. Shirayuri leads the accompanying camp members well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_3.korean: 좋습니다.&n동행하는 캠프 인원들은 시라유리 씨가 잘 이끌어 주시길 바랍니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_30.english: Miss Iris, right now you need to act with a realistic perspective. I would like to ask you to do the same.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_30.korean: 이리스 양, 지금은 현실적인 면을 생각해서 행동할 필요가 있어요.&n저도 이렇게 부탁드릴게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_31.english: Haa... Got it. We can just cooperate for a moment.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_32.english: Instead, we will definitely divide the supplies, so keep that in mind.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_32.korean: 대신 물자는 확실하게 나눌 테니까 그리 알라고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_34.english: Okay. Du kannst dir so viel nehmen, wie du willst.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_35.english: Stop pretending to care. It's annoying.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_35.korean: 신경 쓰는 척은 집어쳐. 재수 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_37.english: Still, it seems we have agreed to cooperate safely.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_38.english: Our relationship won't improve suddenly, but we will try our best to work things out.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_38.korean: 서로 관계가 갑자기 나아지진 않겠지만, 최대한 풀어가 보겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_39.english: Kent asked me to stay at the camp. Because someone has to guard this place.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_39.korean: 켄트는 캠프에 남아 달라고 부탁했습니다.&n누군가는 이곳을 지켜야 하니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_4.english: Commander, I ask you to focus on command rather than combat.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_40.english: Just having Iris brought here was a great help.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_40.korean: 이리스를 이렇게 불러와준 것만으로도 큰 도움이 됐습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_43.english: As expected, there are many people targeting the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_43.korean: 역시 예상대로 백화점을 노리는 사람이 많군요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_44.english: Why? Are you scared or something? The great Soulworker is really such a coward.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_44.korean: 왜? 쫄리기라도 해?&n대단하신 소울워커 님이 겁도 참 많으시네.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_45.english: I'm not fighting alone. If we escalate this for no reason, the damage to our side will be severe as well.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_45.korean: 나 혼자 싸우는 게 아니잖아.&n괜히 일을 키우면 이쪽 피해도 심해져.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_46.english: First, let's wait and see how things go.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_47.english: You came all the way here and you're going to play it safe? What on earth are you doing here!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_47.korean: 여기까지 와서 몸이나 사리겠다고?&n넌 대체 여기 뭐 하러 온 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_48.english: Are you planning to let the other guys take everything from us and everything else?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_48.korean: 다른 녀석들에게 물자고 뭐고 다 뺏길 생각이야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_49.english: It’s not like we only have one or two supplies, so there’s no need to rush. It’s best to secure the profit without getting into a fight.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_49.korean: 물자가 한두 개만 있는 것도 아니니까 서두를 거 없어.&n적당히 부딪히지 않고 이득을 챙기는 게 최선이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_5.english: Nein, ich muss kurz auf jemanden warten.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_51.english: Miss Iris, let's trust Mr. Tenebris and wait for now. It won't be too late to act if a real problem arises.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_51.korean: 이리스 양, 지금은 테네브리스 씨를 믿고 기다려 보죠.&n정말 문제가 생기면 그때 움직여도 늦지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_52.english: Fine, I'll hold back just this once. Let's see what that so-called best effort of yours is all about.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_52.korean: 그래, 딱 한 번만 참는다.&n그 잘난 최선이라는 걸 함 보자고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_53.english: You're just pathetically hiding yourself. When are you going to fight properly?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_53.korean: 한심하게 몸이나 숨기고 있고.&n언제쯤 돼야 좀 제대로 싸울 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_54.english: Lasst uns einen erbitterten Kampf austragen.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_55.english: We can't just blindly fight other camps. We have to time our entry perfectly.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_55.korean: 다른 캠프와 마구잡이로 싸울 순 없잖아.&n진입할 타이밍을 확실하게 재야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_56.english: Wer so auf Nummer sicher geht, verliert am Ende alles.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_57.english: You're just going to knock on the doors of empty department stores and spout lines like, "Even though we didn't get anything, if someone else was saved, that's enough," aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_57.korean: 텅 빈 백화점 문이나 두드리면서, '비록 우린 아무것도 못 얻었지만 다른 사람이 구원받았다면 그걸로 충분해' 같은 대사나 칠 거지?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_58.english: Even I don't have that much tolerance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_58.korean: 아무리 나라도 그 정도 아량은 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_59.english: I'm just waiting for the right timing to enter. I'm going to take advantage of the situation while the other camps are fighting each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_59.korean: 내부 진입 타이밍을 재고 있을 뿐이야.&n다른 캠프끼리 싸우는 도중에 어부지리를 노릴 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_6.english: There is a task Kent asked me to leave to him. If you wait a little while—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_6.korean: 켄트가 자기에게 맡겨달라 한 일이 있습니다.&n조금 기다리면ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_60.english: Hehe, dann lass es uns mal so versuchen.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_61.english: Just as Mr. Tenebris said, look for an opportunity, and when that moment comes, fight fiercely just as Miss Iris suggested.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_61.korean: 테네브리스 씨 말대로 기회를 살피고,&n그 순간이 오면 이리스 양 의견대로 화끈하게 싸우는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_62.english: With this, your opinions combine, so there's no need to argue about whose view is better, right?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_62.korean: 이러면 두 분의 의견이 합쳐저 누구의 의견이 어떻다 할 필요도 없겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_63.english: Hmm... It's annoying because I strangely understand what he's saying...
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_63.korean: 으음… 쟤 말은 이상하게 이해가 가서 짜증 난단 말이지…

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_64.english: Okay, but when the opportunity comes, make sure you strike decisively. Don't get scared and run away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_64.korean: 좋아, 대신 기회가 왔을 때는 확실히 치는 거다. 쫄아서 도망치지나 말고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_66.english: After that, we found a good timing to enter and easily took over the interior of the department store.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_66.korean: - 그 뒤로 우리는 좋은 진입 타이밍을 찾아, 어렵지 않게 백화점 내부를 차지했다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_67.english: Phew, the Soul Junk is pretty much sorted out.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_68.english: Ja, es ist alles vorbei. Mit Miss Iris an meiner Seite ist es viel einfacher.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_68.korean: 네, 전부 끝났어요.&n이리스 양과 함께하니 훨씬 수월하네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_69.english: Yeah... Huh? What is this? There's something lying here—
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_69.korean: 그렇네… 응? 뭐야 여기에 뭔가 떨어져 있ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_72.english: No, I just noticed you were suddenly spacing out. Is there something on that teddy bear?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_72.korean: 아뇨, 갑자기 멍하니 있으시길래.&n그 곰인형에 뭐가 있나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_73.english: Ahaha, it's nothing. I just thought it was a cute teddy bear!
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_73.korean: 아하하, 아무것도 아니야 그냥 귀여운 곰인형이구나, 싶어서!

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_75.english: Anyway, that certain loser who thinks he's cool doesn't seem to have shown his full potential.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_75.korean: 아무튼, 자기가 쿨한 줄 아는 어느 찐따는 제 실력을 다 내지도 않은 것 같지만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_76.english: Why on earth are you playing it half-heartedly? Are you hiding your true power like Kent?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_76.korean: 대체 왜 적당히 하는 거야? 켄트처럼 진짜 힘을 숨기는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_77.english: Das liegt vermutlich an Herrn Tenebris' eigenem Gerechtigkeitssinn.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_77.korean: 아마 테네브리스 씨 나름의 정의 때문이겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_78.english: If I act with all my heart toward people, it’s just like being a robber or a thug. I’m deliberately keeping my distance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_78.korean: 사람을 상대로 진심을 다하면 그건 강도나 양아치와 마찬가지니까요.&n일부러 선을 지키는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_79.english: Isn't it just that you're doing it half-heartedly because you don't want to put in the effort? You always cover for him no matter what he does.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_79.korean: 그냥 힘쓰기가 싫어서 적당히 하는 게 아니고?&n넌 걔가 뭘해도 다 감싸주더라.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_80.english: No, I just wanted to say that Mr. Tenebris is going through his own struggles.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_80.korean: 아뇨, 저는 단지 테네브리스 씨가 나름대로의 고생을 하고 있다는 걸 말씀드리려는 것뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_82.english: What? Wait, wait! Miss Iris? What's going on all of a sudden?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_82.korean: 네? 자, 잠깐! 이리스 양? 갑자기 무슨 일인가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_83.english: You… do you perhaps genuinely respect that Tenebris or something?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_83.korean: 너… 혹시 진심으로 저 테네브리스를 존경하고 있거나 그래?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_84.english: I do respect him. At the very least, there is no doubt that he is taking the lead and working hard for the people at the camp.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_84.korean: 존경은 하고 있습니다.&n적어도 캠프 사람들을 위해 앞장서고 노력하고 있다는 것만큼은 틀림없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_85.english: I don't know what's so admirable about that old-fashioned jerk who always acts like he knows everything.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_85.korean: 항상 지가 다 아는 척하는 꼰대의 뭐가 그리 존경스럽다는 건지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_86.english: Listen up, Shirayuri. That guy is a pathetic loser who has lost his mind because he's tainted by his own hypocrisy.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_86.korean: 잘 들어, 시라유리.&n저놈은 자기의 위선에 물들어서 제정신을 못 차리는 한심한 놈이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_87.english: Especially the way they're spouting nonsense, saying things like you can save everyone just by influencing one Desire Walker.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_87.korean: 특히나 데자이어 워커 한 마리 감화시켰다고 전부 구할 수 있니 뭐니, 정신 나간 소리 지껄이고 있잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_88.english: Things like Lily are like bombs that could explode at any moment. Other people are trembling with anxiety too.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_88.korean: 릴리 같은 것들은 언제 터질지 모르는 폭탄이라고.&n다른 사람들도 불안에 떨고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_89.english: But Miss Iris, I heard that Mr. Tenebris is keeping his promise to the missing Mr. Lord, isn't that?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_89.korean: 하지만 이리스 양.&n듣기로 그건 테네브리스 씨가 실종된 로드 씨와의 약속을 지키기 위한 게 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_9.english: It's unexpected that you'd move with us.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_90.english: Shirayuri. Is someone whose whereabouts you don't even know important? Or is someone who is alive right now more important?
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_90.korean: 시라유리.&n어디 있는지도 모르는 사람이 중요해? 아니면 지금 당장 살아있는 사람이 중요해?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_91.english: … Of course, the living are important.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_92.english: That's right, it's no different from an old person rejecting modern civilization to uphold outdated traditions, such as promises made to someone who isn't even right in front of them.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_92.korean: 맞아, 눈앞에 있지도 않는 사람과의 약속이니 뭐니 낡은 전통을 지키자고 현대 문명을 거절하는 노인과 다를 게 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_93.english: You should think carefully too. Don't be fooled by the nonsense of old-fashioned jerks; let's look at reality.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_93.korean: 너도 잘 생각해봐.&n꼰대의 헛소리에 현혹되지 말고 현실을 보자고.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_94.english: It seems like it's too late for that commander or whatever, as he's already been swayed by the old farts, but at least we need to wake up.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_94.korean: 그 사령관이니 뭐니 하는 사람은 이미 꼰대에게 현혹돼서 늦은 것 같지만, 우리라도 정신 차려야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_97.english: Was ist denn schon wieder so traurig?

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_98.english: It is true that Mr. Tenebris has many flaws. There must be many things to be disappointed about or complaints.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_98.korean: 테네브리스 씨에게 단점이 많은 건 사실이에요.&n아쉬운 점이나 불만이 많겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_99.english: However, I am thinking hard behind the scenes and striving to put it into practice just as much.
LastCorruptedRecord2-8OP_99.korean: 하지만 그만큼 보이지 않는 곳에서 고민하고, 실천하려고 애쓰고 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_1.english: After that, Iris disappeared from us with the surviving half of her companions.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_1.korean: - 그 뒤로 이리스는 살아남은 절반의 동료를 데리고 우리에게서 사라졌다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_10.english: Wouldn't it be the feeling of wanting to get as far away from here as possible?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_10.korean: 가능한 여기서 멀리 떨어지고 싶다는 심정이 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_101.english: Anyway, there is nothing good about listening only to adults.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_101.korean: 아무튼, 어른들 말만 들어서 좋을 거 하나 없다는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_102.english: … Yes, I was wrong. Because I listened to the adults and didn't step forward myself… I lost someone so precious to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_102.korean: …그래, 틀렸어.&n어른의 말을 듣고, 내가 직접 나서지 않았던 탓에… 너무 소중한 사람을 잃었으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_103.english: If it weren't for that, I wouldn't be living so rebelliously now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_103.korean: 그 일만 아니었어도 지금 이렇게까지 반항적으로 살진 않았을 테지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_104.english: … Ha, whatever. How did I end up telling a little kid like this? I just got carried away with my mouth today.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_104.korean: …하, 됐어. 어쩌다가 이런 꼬맹이한테 이런 얘기까지 하네.&n오늘따라 괜히 입이 가벼워졌어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_105.english: … Was, Kleiner? Willst du etwa sagen, dass ich auch falsch liege?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_105.korean: …뭐야 꼬맹이. 너도 내가 틀렸다고 말하려는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_107.english: I'm such a fool. Why did I get so worked up over a child?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_107.korean: 나도 참, 바보 같네. 어린아이 상대로 왜 열을 낸 건지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_108.english: Still... thank you. Thank you for telling me I wasn't wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_108.korean: 그래도... 고맙다. 내가 틀리지 않았다고 말해줘서.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_109.english: And… I suppose that’s not what you meant.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_109.korean: 그리고… 그런 의도로 말한 건 아니겠지만.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_110.english: Little kid…? Anyway, this big sister is still a fresh-faced 'high school girl,' you know?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_110.korean: 꼬맹이…? 아무튼간에 이 누나는 아직 파릇파릇한 '여고생' 이란다?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_113.english: That is certainly how it looks to a child's eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_113.korean: 어린아이의 눈으로는 분명 그렇게 보이는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_114.english: Is it 'Everything adults say is wrong'...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_114.korean: 어른들이 하는 말은 전부 틀렸다' 인가…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_116.english: I suppose so... because they wouldn't want to run into each other again, even by chance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_116.korean: 그렇겠지… 우연이라도 다시는 마주치고 싶지 않을 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_117.english: It's okay. It's true that you were really shocked, but I've told you to rest for now.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_117.korean: 괜찮아. 충격을 많이 받은 건 사실이지만. 지금은 쉬라고 해뒀어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_118.english: I'm glad I have some spare time thanks to what Shirayuri took care of.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_118.korean: 시라유리가 처리해준 일 덕분에 여유가 있어서 다행이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_119.english: How did the supply situation on Iris's side look?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_119.korean: 이리스 쪽의 물자 상황은 어때 보였어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_120.english: Shirayuri? Are you perhaps still holding onto feelings?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_120.korean: 시라유리? 혹시 아직도 마음에 담아 두고 있는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_121.english: What did Shirayuri think when she saw Iris back then?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_121.korean: 시라유리는 그때 이리스를 보고 무슨 생각을 했어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_122.english: Then the two of you can become good friends.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_122.korean: 그렇다면 두 사람은 좋은 친구가 될 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_123.english: If a friend goes down the wrong path, wouldn't you make them come to their senses, even if it means hitting them?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_123.korean: 친구가 나쁜 길로 빠지면, 때려서라도 정신차리게 해주지 않겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_126.english: Is there a way to do that?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_127.english: Huh? That's true, but... something sounds a bit strange.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_127.korean: 응? 그렇긴 한데… 말이 뭔가 좀 이상한데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_13.english: I'm glad if it was helpful.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_132.english: It's not that I'm sulking... it's just that I'm not really happy about it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_132.korean: 삐진 건 아니고… 그냥 마음에 좀 안 들어서 그래.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_133.english: That's true, but... sigh... I guess I have no choice but to give it a try... Well then, I'll be going.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_133.korean: 그건 그렇지만… 하아… 해보는 수밖에 없나… 그럼 다녀올게.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_135.english: Leave it to me. I am invincible right now.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_136.english: Just so you know, don't write down today's work in your notebook.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_136.korean: 말해두는데 오늘 일은 수첩에 적지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_138.english: Um... over there, I mean... I got lost.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_14.english: It looks okay for now, but it won't last long.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_14.korean: 아직은 괜찮아 보이지만, 오래 버티지는 못할 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_141.english: B-but... my older sister glared at me with a scary face, so I was like, "Waaah~"
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_141.korean: 그, 그치만... 누나가 무서운 얼굴로 노려봐서 후에에엥~

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_144.english: Then, is it okay for me to stay here?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_144.korean: 그럼, 저 여기 있어도 괜찮은 거예요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_145.english: Wow! Thank you so much, sis!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_149.english: I've been watching you for a while, and you always try to do everything on your own.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_149.korean: 계속 봐왔는데, 누나는 뭐든지 혼자서 하려고 하잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_15.english: If we had stayed at the base, we would have had enough to last a few months, but considering the continuous marches and the battles with Soul Junk that occur every time, it is not a comfortable situation.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_15.korean: 주둔지에 있었다면 몇 달은 버틸 양이지만, 계속되는 행군과 그때마다 일어나는 소울정크와의 전투를 생각하면 여유로운 상황은 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_150.english: Aren't you accepting help from others? There were people who offered to help...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_150.korean: 다른 사람의 도움은 안 받아요? 도와주겠다는 사람도 있었는데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_154.english: Hmm… but I think you would have done well, sis?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_154.korean: 음… 그래도 누나는 잘했을 것 같은데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_155.english: So, is everything adults say wrong?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_155.korean: 그럼, 어른들이 하는 말은 전부 틀린 거예요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_156.english: I don't think all adults are wrong.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_156.korean: 저는 어른들이 전부 틀렸다고는 생각 안 해요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_157.english: No. You took me in when I was all alone.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_158.english: So, it’s not wrong. Because I consider my older sister an adult!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_158.korean: 그러니까 틀린 게 아니에요. 저는 누나를 어른이라고 생각하니까요!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_16.english: - Iris steht bereits unter psychischem Druck.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_17.english: It is overwhelming enough just leading colleagues in a situation like that, but if it leads to a shortage of supplies, it wouldn't be surprising if something happened.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_17.korean: - 그런 상황에서 동료를 이끌고 있다는 것만으로도 벅찬데, 물자 부족으로까지 이어지면 무슨 일이 일어나도 이상하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_18.english: - You must take action before that happens.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_18.korean: - 그렇게 되기 전에 반드시 손을 써야 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_2.english: - Ohne zu verraten, wohin sie reisten, was sie in Zukunft vorhatten oder irgendetwas anderes…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_2.korean: - 어디로 향하는지도, 앞으로 어떻게 할지도 그 무엇도 알리지 않은 채…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_20.english: ...It's the first time I've hit someone like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_21.english: Neither I, nor Shirayuri before the apocalypse, needed to resort to violence to motivate people.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_21.korean: 지금의 저도, 멸망 전의 시라유리도 사람을 움직이게 하기 위해 폭력을 휘두를 필요는 없었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_22.english: A few words of secret that person held... that was enough.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_22.korean: 그 사람이 가지고 있는 비밀 몇 마디… 그걸로 충분했으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_23.english: Aber ich... Gewalt auf diese Weise...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_24.english: I might be more violent than I thought.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_25.english: Damals fand ich Miss Iris einfach nur bemitleidenswert.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_25.korean: 그때는 그저… 이리스 양이 안타깝다고 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_26.english: A good friend… Me? But I… Miss Iris…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_26.korean: 좋은 친구… 제가 말인가요?&n하지만 저는 이리스 양을…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_28.english: Ja, ich werde auch wieder an Miss Iris denken.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_28.korean: 네, 저도 이리스 양에 대해서 다시 한번 생각해볼게요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_29.english: Dann muss ich wohl entscheiden, wie es von nun an weitergehen soll.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_29.korean: 그럼, 지금은 앞으로 어떻게 행동할지 정해야겠네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_3.english: Tenebris did not hold onto Iris like that.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_30.english: Whatever happens, to resolve this matter, I must meet with Iris again.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_30.korean: - 뭐가 됐든, 이번 일을 해결하기 위해서는 이리스와 다시 만나야 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_31.english: - Aber auch bei Iris werde ich keinen guten Eindruck hinterlassen.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_31.korean: - 하지만 나 역시 이리스에게는 좋은 인상으로 남아 있지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_32.english: Considering his tendency to dislike adults, there is a high chance he won't meet me even if I go in person.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_32.korean: - 어른을 싫어하는 성향을 생각하면 내가 직접 가도 만나주지 않을 가능성이 높아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_33.english: Even if they agree to meet me, there is no guarantee they will properly listen to me.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_33.korean: - 설사 만나 준다고 해도 내 말을 제대로 들어준다는 보장도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_34.english: Do we have no choice but to use somewhat coercive measures here? No, that won't provide a fundamental solution.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_34.korean: - 어쩔 수 없이 여기서는 조금 강압적인 수단을 써야 하나?&n아니, 그래서는 근본적인 해결이 되지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_36.english: Kommandant, es gibt nur einen Weg.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_37.english: Yes, it is a way to meet Miss Iris and open up to each other.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_37.korean: 네, 이리스 양과 만날 수도 있고 서로 마음을 털고 이야기도 할 수 있는 방법이죠.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_38.english: Shirayuri smiled, took a notebook out of her pocket, and opened it.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_38.korean: - 시라유리는 웃으며 주머니 속에서 수첩을 꺼내 펼쳤다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_39.english: To summarize, Miss Iris dislikes people who give her orders. And since most of those giving orders are adults, she ultimately refuses to sit down and talk with them.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_39.korean: 정리하면 이리스 양은 자신에게 명령하는 사람을 싫어하죠.&n그리고 그 명령하는 대부분이 어른이니, 결국 어른과 마주 앉아 대화하는 걸 거부하는 겁니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_4.english: He didn't say it, but he probably didn't even have the energy left to persuade Iris, who was already filled with hatred toward him.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_4.korean: - 말하진 않았지만, 이미 자신에 대한 증오로 가득 찬 이리스를 설득할 기력조차 남지 않은 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_40.english: Then it's simple. If you aren't an adult... wouldn't everything be resolved? Besides, this happens to be virtual reality, doesn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_40.korean: 그렇다면 단순하죠.&n어른이 아니라면… 모든 게 해결되지 않을까요?&n게다가 마침 여기는 가상현실이잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_41.english: - Wait... You said it's okay as long as I'm not an 'adult'...? Is this virtual reality...?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_42.english: Hehehe, since things have come to this, I have no choice but to do it, do I?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_42.korean: 우후후, 이렇게 된 이상 할 수밖에 없지 않나요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_43.english: It's here. Miss Iris is in the wide area if you follow this path all the way.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_43.korean: 여기에요.&n이 길을 쭉 따라가면 있는 넓은 장소에 이리스 양이 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_44.english: There are sentries, but... looking like this, Commander, you should be able to pass through without any difficulty.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_44.korean: 보초가 있긴 하지만… 지금 모습의 사령관님이라면 어렵지 않게 통과하실 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_45.english: Then, as I mentioned beforehand, I will prepare it in advance.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_45.korean: 그럼 저는 사전에 말씀드린 대로 미리 준비해 놓겠습니다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_46.english: Commander, you aren't sulking, are you?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_47.english: Commander, you know that this is the surest method for now, don't you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_47.korean: 지금으로선 이게 제일 확실한 방법이라는 걸 사령관님도 아시잖아요?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_5.english: - Maybe he gave up because he was fed up with her for not believing in him until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_5.korean: - 어쩌면 끝까지 자신을 믿어주지 않은 그녀에게 질려 포기한 걸지도 모른다.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_50.english: Please take good care of Miss Iris.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_51.english: If many people saw this now, they would be happy... It's a shame.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_51.korean: 지금 이 모습을 본다면, 즐거워할 분들이 많을 텐데… 아쉽네요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_52.english: Yes, of course I won't write it 'in this notebook'. Hehe...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_52.korean: 네, 물론 '이 수첩에는' 적지 않을 거예요. 후후…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_54.english: Verdammt! Ugh, es tut immer noch weh!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_55.english: That guy, hitting with all his might...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_55.korean: 그 녀석, 온 힘을 다해 때리고 말이야…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_58.english: Warum? Ist Soul Junk etwa wieder aufgetaucht?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_59.english: No, actually, someone came to visit...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_6.english: If only we had understood each other even a little bit… the outcome would surely have been different…
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_6.korean: - 조금이라도 서로 이해했다면… 분명 결과는 달랐을 텐데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_60.english: You came to find me? To such a remote place? Who is it? You didn't send them from the Grass Blanket side, did you?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_60.korean: 찾아왔다고? 이런 외진 곳에?&n누군데? 설마 잔디이불 쪽에서 보낸 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_61.english: That's not it. It's... a 'young child'.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_62.english: So it's you? The little kid who suddenly showed up.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_63.english: Where did you come from? It wouldn't be easy to come all the way here alone.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_63.korean: 어디서 온 거야? 여기까지 혼자 오는 게 쉬운 일은 아닐 텐데.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_64.english: You got lost? Don't think you drifted in during the recent hiatus, do you? Huh...?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_64.korean: 길을 잃었다고? 설마 최근 공백에 흘러들어온 건가?&n응…?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_65.english: Moment mal, dieses Gesicht… Das kommt mir bekannt vor.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_65.korean: 가만있어 봐, 그 얼굴…. 어디서 많이 본 것 같은데?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_67.english: Hmm... I'm pretty sure I've seen this recently... and the memory is hazy...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_67.korean: 으응… 분명 최근에 본 적이 있는 것 같은데...&n기억이 날 듯 말 듯…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_68.english: I'm going to get caught at this rate! I guess there's no other choice... I have no choice but to use that method...!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_68.korean: - 이러다 들키겠어! 어쩔 수 없나… 그 방법을 사용하는 수밖에…!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_70.english: What, what's wrong all of a sudden? Why are you crying?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_70.korean: 뭐, 뭐야 갑자기? 왜 울고 그래?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_71.english: Ugh, okay! I said I get it! Sorry for glaring at you! I was wrong! So don't cry! Stop!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_71.korean: 윽, 알았어! 알았다고! 노려봐서 미안해! 내가 잘못했어! 그러니까 울지 마! 뚝!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_72.english: Really, really! See, good boy, right? You're a man, aren't you? You shouldn't cry over something like this!
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_72.korean: 정말 정말! 자, 착하지?&n사나이잖아? 이 정도로 울면 안 되지!

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_73.english: Haa... this is going to be a headache...

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_74.english: Ms. Iris, what are you going to do?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_75.english: What else can we do... We can't just leave a child like this. We'll have to keep him for the time being.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_75.korean: 어쩌긴… 어린아이를 이대로 내버려둘 수도 없잖아.&n당분간 우리가 데리고 있어야지.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_77.english: I know that too. That supplies are going to start running low soon. I'll be moving to find them soon.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_77.korean: 나도 알고 있어. 슬슬 물자가 부족해질 거라는걸.&n조만간 물자를 찾으러 움직일 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_8.english: I found where Miss Iris is.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_81.english: Ah, no, it's fine... It's a bit bad for my heart...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_81.korean: 아아, 아니야, 괜찮아…&n심장에 좀 안 좋네…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_87.english: Why have you been following me around like that since earlier? You're being annoying...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_87.korean: 아까부터 왜 그렇게 졸졸 따라다니는 거야? 귀찮게…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_88.english: Ugh... well... it's not like it's impossible...
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_88.korean: 으윽… 뭐어… 안 되는 건 아닌데…

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_89.english: If you make that face… I can't refuse.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_89.korean: 그런 표정을 지으면… 거절할 수가 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_9.english: It isn't far yet, but considering the speed of travel so far, it will get further and further away.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_9.korean: 아직은 멀지 않은 곳이지만, 지금까지의 이동 속도를 생각하면 점점 더 멀어질 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_90.english: Wovon redest du denn da? Sehe ich etwa einsam aus?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_90.korean: 이건 또 무슨 소리야?&n넌 내가 외롭게 보여?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_92.english: You're just a little kid, yet you're asking all sorts of things?

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_93.english: … Das ist schon so, seit ich klein war.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_94.english: If you only listen to others, you won't be able to do anything in the end.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_94.korean: 다른 사람 말만 듣고 있으면, 결국 아무것도 못 해.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_96.english: Remember this well, too. In the end, the only one you can trust is yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_96.korean: 너도 잘 기억해둬.&n결국 마지막에 믿을 건 자기 자신뿐이야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_97.english: It's just how it is. It means that if adults unnecessarily give you unsolicited advice, things only get more complicated.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_97.korean: 그냥 그런 게 있어.&n괜히 어른들이 훈수 두면 더 꼬이기만 한다는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_98.english: … I hate it. Especially those who act all high and mighty while knowing nothing about my life. 'You shouldn't do that.' 'Do it like everyone else.' … It was always just words like that.
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_98.korean: …싫지. 특히 내 인생에 대해선 아무것도 모르면서 잘난 척하는 것들.&n'그렇게 하면 안 된다.' '다른 사람처럼 해라.' …언제나 그런 말뿐이었어.

LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_99.english: … You’re a really strange kid. Are you really a child? Isn’t it just someone wearing a mask and disguising themselves as a little child?
LastCorruptedRecord2-9ED_99.korean: …너, 참 묘한 애네.&n진짜 애 맞아? 누군가 탈을 쓰고 어린 아이로 변장한 거 아니야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_1.english: - We returned safely after defeating the Iron Bug thanks to Ephnel's efforts.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_1.korean: - 에프넬의 활약으로 철충을 무사히 쓰러트린 뒤 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_10.english: Hmm... You have a similar mindset to me, surprisingly.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_100.english: What did you change your mind about?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_101.english: It's not really something to be that disappointed about. That's not like Ephnel.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_101.korean: 그렇게 실망할 일은 아니잖아. 에프넬 답지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_102.english: I don't think it's the starting point.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_103.english: You definitely haven't changed. But if you haven't changed even though your thoughts have changed...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_103.korean: 분명히 네 모습은 변하지 않았어. 하지만 생각이 바뀌었는데도 변하지 않았다면…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_104.english: It probably means you weren't a bad guy from the start.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_104.korean: 처음부터 네가 나쁜 녀석이 아니었다는 뜻이겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_105.english: Right. Nothing has changed. Instead, you now know better what kind of person you are.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_105.korean: 그래. 달라진 건 없어. 대신 이제 너 스스로가 어떤 사람인지 더 잘 알게 된 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_106.english: Wouldn't that be enough? Because the changes will start now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_106.korean: 그거면 충분하지 않을까? 바뀌는 건 이제부터 시작일 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_107.english: At first, you were indifferent to everything and lived only for yourself, didn't you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_107.korean: 처음에는 모든 일에 무관심했고, 오직 자신만을 위해 살았잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_108.english: But now it's different. As I clash with and hang out with the Strikers guys,
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_108.korean: 하지만 지금은 달라. 스트라이커즈 애들과 부딪히고 어울리면서,

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_109.english: I moved to find an answer I didn't know myself.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_109.korean: 스스로 알지 못한 답을 찾기 위해 움직였지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_11.english: But you know what? If you look at it that way, aren't you the most dangerous one?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_11.korean: 근데 말이지, 그렇게 따지면 제일 위험한 건 너 아냐?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_111.english: Unless people intentionally try to go astray, they eventually become similar.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_111.korean: 사람은 일부러 엇나가려 하지 않는 이상, 결국 비슷해져.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_112.english: But without someone to lead you, you'll easily crumble.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_112.korean: 하지만 이끌어 주는 사람이 없으면 쉽게 무너져.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_113.korean: 그러니까 사람은 혼자 살 수 없는 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_114.english: Right. Something good will definitely happen.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_114.korean: 그래. 분명 좋은 일이 생길 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_12.english: You're the one who approached me kindly for no reason. You don't even seem to want anything in particular.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_12.korean: 너야말로 이유도 없이 자상하게 나한테 다가왔잖아.&n딱히 뭘 원하는 것도 없어 보이는데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_13.english: Now that I think about it, it suddenly seems suspicious...?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_14.english: What on earth are you talking about? I've never even been called a 'good person' before.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_14.korean: 그건 또 무슨 소리야?&n난 지금까지 ‘좋은 인간’이라는 말 들어본 적도 없는데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_15.english: It looks like my optic nerve cells died from all the hard work, so I've lost my ability to judge people. I'm definitely not a good person.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_15.korean: 고된 일 하느라 시신경 세포가 죽어서 사람 보는 눈이 없어졌나 보네.&n난 절대 좋은 인간은 아냐.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_16.english: Okay, that's neat. No need to say more. Good.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_16.korean: 오케이, 깔끔하다. 더 말할 필요도 없네. 좋아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_2.english: Ugh... it's still sticky... and it even smells weird... and that Iron Bug just suddenly exploded at the end, spraying some strange fluid.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_2.korean: 으에… 아직도 끈적거려… 이상한 냄새까지 나고…&n철충 녀석 마지막에 갑자기 이상한 체액을 뿌리면서 터져버리기나 하고 말이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_20.english: Phew~ I feel like I can finally breathe~
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_20.korean: 으햐~ 이제 좀 살 것 같네~

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_21.english: I wondered what we would do when we were all covered in filth together…
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_21.korean: 다 같이 오물을 뒤집어썼을 때는 어떻게 하나 싶었는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_22.english: Ullr, you need to wash your hair properly, too.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_23.english: Ugh... so annoying... Mina, wash me~

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_24.english: Anyway... it can't be helped. I'll help you, so just stay still.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_24.korean: 하여간… 어쩔 수 없네.&n도와줄 테니까 가만히 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_25.english: The water temperature is just right. It feels like all the fatigue I've accumulated is melting away.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_25.korean: 물의 온도는 딱 좋네요.&n그동안에 쌓인 피로가 풀리는 기분이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_26.english: Yes, it feels really good. I can already feel my skin becoming smooth.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_26.korean: 네, 정말로 기분이 좋사와요.&n벌서 피부까지 매끈해지는 느낌이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_27.english: I never imagined there would be a hot spring in a place like this~ It really is true that living a good life is the way to go~
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_27.korean: 설마 이런 곳에 온천이 있을 줄이야~&n역시 착하게 살고 볼 일이라니까~

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_28.english: Well then~ I've lived such a good life.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_29.english: I work for fair compensation. If it is insufficient, I demand more. If I do not receive it, I make them pay a corresponding price.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_29.korean: 합당한 보수를 받고 일을 한다.&n모자라면 더 받아낸다.&n못 받으면 상응하는 대가를 치르게 한다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_3.english: Well, but since my personal business is finished... I'm somewhat satisfied.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_3.korean: 뭐, 하지만 개인적인 일도 끝났으니까… 나름 만족이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_30.english: It's simple and easy to understand, isn't it?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_32.english: Commander, how long on earth do you plan to stay here with us?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_32.korean: 사령관은 대체 언제까지 여기에 같이 있을 셈이야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_33.english: … Is that all you have to say? Then…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_35.english: - Ephnel came to find me again.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_36.english: I didn't come here because I wanted to meet you, either. It feels like I came here out of necessity, as if I had to talk to several people, but you were the only one I could talk to.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_36.korean: 나도 너를 만나고 싶어서 온 건 아니야.&n마치 여러 명과 얘기해야 할 걸, 말할 사람이 너밖에 없으니까… 어쩔 수 없이 찾아온 느낌이지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_37.english: Do I... seem a bit different?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_37.korean: 나 좀… 뭔가 달라진 것 같아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_4.english: It's a really personal matter. It wouldn't make much difference if I told you anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_4.korean: 진짜 개인적인 일이야.&n너한테 말해봤자 큰 의미도 없을 테고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_40.english: wasn't talking about looks, you idiot! You were raving earlier saying 'inner qualities matter more than outward appearance'... So you're only looking at looks in the end?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_40.korean: 외모 얘기한 게 아니야, 멍청아!&n아까는 ‘겉으로 보이는 모습보다 내면이 더 중요하다’고 떠들던 주제에… 결국 외모만 보는 거냐?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_41.english: If I dressed up and they recognized me right away, that would be truly creepy!
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_41.korean: 만약 내가 뭘 꾸미고 나왔는데 바로 알아봤다면, 그거야말로 소름 돋는 일이라고!

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_42.english: Ugh… Why don’t you just go die for real…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_43.english: Anyway, what I'm talking about is the mental aspect.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_43.korean: 아무튼 내가 말하는 건 정신적인 부분이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_44.english: … Really? There hasn't been even the slightest change?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_45.english: After coming here and going through various things, I changed my mindset a bit. So I thought there would be some kind of mental change, but...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_45.korean: 여기 와서 여러 일을 겪으면서, 생각을 좀 고쳐 먹었거든.&n그래서 뭔가 정신적인 변화가 있을 줄 알았는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_46.english: …Turns out I wasn't as bad a guy as I thought. Something like that?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_46.korean: …알고 보니, 난 생각만큼 나쁜 녀석은 아니었다. 정도?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_47.english: Still, it feels a bit empty to think that nothing has changed. It’s like we’ve gone back to square one.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_47.korean: 그래도 아무 변화가 없다고 생각하니 좀 허무해.&n결국 다시 원점으로 돌아간 기분이랄까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_48.english: Uh...? Is that how it works?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_5.english: It’s not that I don’t trust you or anything, it’s just that it’s not something that needs to be said. … It’s like asking how many squares of toilet paper you used, for example.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_5.korean: 널 못 믿는다거나 그런 건 아니고, 그냥 말할 필요가 없는 일이니까.&n…예를 들면 화장실 휴지를 몇 칸 썼는지 묻는 거나 마찬가지지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_51.english: Haa, at first I wondered what I was even doing... well, it was a rewarding mission in its own way. Maybe it was a relief that I met you guys here...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_51.korean: 하아, 처음에는 이게 뭐하는 짓인가 싶었는데…&n뭐, 그래도 나름 보람찬 임무였어. 여기서 너희를 만난 게 다행이었을 지도…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_52.english: Still, on the surface, nothing much has changed. They'll probably demand money just like usual and hurl insults at the guys they don't like.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_52.korean: 그래도 겉으로는 크게 변한 건 없을 거야.&n평소처럼 돈을 요구하고, 마음에 안 드는 놈들한테 욕을 퍼붓겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_53.english: I still won't readily help humans. And I'll stab anyone I don't like with my spear.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_53.korean: 여전히 인간을 선뜻 도와주지도 않을 거고.&n맘에 안 드는 놈들은 전부 내 창으로 찔러 버릴 테고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_55.english: I won't hate the world or all the people anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_55.korean: 이제 세상도, 인간도 전부 다 싫어하지는 않을게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_56.english: Because there might be more good encounters in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_56.korean: 앞으로 좋은 만남이 더 있을지도 모르니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_59.english: Aaaah! I don't know why, but I suddenly feel embarrassed! This is the only time I've had a conversation like this with you! It's creepy and annoying! I'm never doing this again!
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_59.korean: 으아아! 왠지 모르겠지만, 갑자기 부끄러워졌어!&n너랑 이런 대화 하는 건 이번뿐이야! 소름 끼치고 짜증 나! 다시는 안 할 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_6.english: Really? That's a relief you didn't keep pestering me for no reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_6.korean: 그래? 괜히 집요하게 물고 늘어지지 않아서 다행이네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_62.english: An unexpected situation occurred due to external interference, but record collection was successful.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_62.korean: 외부 간섭으로 인한 예상 외의 상황이 발생하였으나 기록 수집에 성공.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_63.english: Player: Commander Character: Ephnel Ending Branch: Achieved.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_63.korean: 플레이어 : 사령관&n인물 : 에프넬&n엔딩 분기 : 달성 완료.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_64.english: Permission to view the following records.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_66.english: Commander Player, it won't be long now.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_67.english: <The Indomitable Spear Breaking Through Efnel> END.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_68.english: You've worked hard. It seems like there was a bit of a disaster, though...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_68.korean: 고생 많았어. 조금… 재난이 있었던 것 같지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_69.english: Can't you tell me about that personal matter?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_69.korean: 그 개인적인 용무라는 걸 나한테 말해줄 수는 없는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_7.english: I know it's awkward for me to say this, but... is it really okay to trust someone like me that easily?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_7.korean: 근데 내가 이런 말 하긴 뭐하지만…&n나 같은 걸 그렇게 쉽게 믿어도 괜찮아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_70.english: Okay. If you say so, I'll believe you.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_71.english: It is the commander's duty to respect the circumstances of a subordinate.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_71.korean: 대원에게 사정이 있다면 존중해 주는 게 사령관의 도리지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_73.english: People who don't hide their true selves are easy to read, so it's also easy to agree with them.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_73.korean: 자신을 숨기지 않는 사람은 속을 알기 쉽고, 그래서 의견을 맞추기도 쉬워.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_74.english: Because if I give you what you want, I can get what I want too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_74.korean: 원하는 걸 주면 나도 원하는 걸 받을 수 있으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_75.english: But people who approach you unconditionally kindly are different.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_75.korean: 하지만 무작정 친절하게 다가오는 사람은 달라.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_76.english: Just like the saying that there is no such thing as a free lunch, there is no such thing as kindness without a reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_76.korean: 세상에 공짜는 없다는 말처럼, 이유 없는 친절은 존재하지 않거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_77.english: Ephnel, you don't usually hide your desires and just reveal them, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_77.korean: 에프넬, 넌 평소에도 네 욕망을 숨기지 않고 드러내잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_78.english: So I don't think there is any need to doubt you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_78.korean: 그러니까 널 의심할 필요는 없다고 생각해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_79.english: Please think of that as… drawing the big picture.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_79.korean: 그건… 큰 그림을 그리고 있다고 생각해 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_8.english: Even when we first met, you accepted me without any suspicion, even though we were strangers, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_8.korean: 처음 만났을 때도 초면인 날 아무 의심도 없이 받아들였잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_80.english: And I don't consider you a bad person.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_80.korean: 그리고 나는 널 나쁜 인간이라고는 평가하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_81.english: Because inner qualities are more important than outward appearances.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_81.korean: 겉으로 보이는 모습보단 내면이 더 중요하니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_82.english: Even though it may seem like you act solely according to your own will, you have ultimately made choices that benefit everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_82.korean: 넌 네 주관대로만 움직이는 것 같아도, 결과적으로 모두에게 도움이 되는 선택을 해왔어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_83.english: They pretend to be motivated by money, but I think they are just adding a rational reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_83.korean: 돈 때문에 움직이는 척하지만, 사실 그건 합리적인 이유를 덧붙인 것뿐이라고 봐.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_85.english: And finally, just one more thing.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_86.english: How long are you going to stay in that sticky state?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_86.korean: 언제까지 그 끈적한 상태로 있을 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_87.english: I'll prepare a small gift as a reward for your hard work today.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_87.korean: 오늘 고생한 보상으로 작은 선물을 준비할게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_88.english: I've already told the Strikers guys, so how about we all do it together?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_88.korean: 스트라이커즈 애들한테도 얘기해 놨으니까 다 같이 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_89.english: Really? Looks like you've lived a nicer life than you look.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_89.korean: 그래? 보기 보단 착하게 살았나 보네?
